000500:     const RUNTIME_KEY = '__MC_MAP_COMMAND_TOOLKIT_RUNTIME__';
000501:     const previousRuntime = pageWindow[RUNTIME_KEY];
000502:     if (previousRuntime?.version === SCRIPT.version && previousRuntime.destroyed !== true) return;
000503:     try { previousRuntime?.destroy?.('replaced by a newer toolkit runtime'); } catch (err) {}
000504:     const runtime = {
000505:         version: SCRIPT.version,
000506:         destroyed: false,
000507:         timeouts: new Set(),
000508:         intervals: new Set(),
000509:         animationFrames: new Set(),
000510:         observers: new Set(),
000511:         waiters: new Set(),
000512:         requests: new Set(),
000513:         fetchControllers: new Set(),
000514:         listeners: [],
000515:         mapBindings: [],
000516:         hookRestorers: [],
000517:         cleanupCallbacks: [],
000518:         destroy(reason = 'runtime shutdown') {
000519:         if (this.destroyed) return;
000520:         this.destroyed = true;
000521:         for (const id of this.timeouts) { try { pageWindow.clearTimeout(id); } catch (err) {} }
000522:         for (const id of this.intervals) { try { pageWindow.clearInterval(id); } catch (err) {} }
000523:         for (const id of this.animationFrames) { try { pageWindow.cancelAnimationFrame(id); } catch (err) {} }
000524:         this.timeouts.clear();
000525:         this.intervals.clear();
000526:         this.animationFrames.clear();
000527:         for (const settle of Array.from(this.waiters)) { try { settle(false); } catch (err) {} }
000528:         this.waiters.clear();
000529:         for (const request of Array.from(this.requests)) { try { request.abort?.(); } catch (err) {} }
000530:         this.requests.clear();
000531:         for (const controller of Array.from(this.fetchControllers)) { try { controller.abort(); } catch (err) {} }
000532:         this.fetchControllers.clear();
000533:         for (const observer of this.observers) { try { observer.disconnect(); } catch (err) {} }
000534:         this.observers.clear();
000535:         for (const { target, type, listener, options } of this.listeners.splice(0)) {
000536:             try { target.removeEventListener(type, listener, options); } catch (err) {}
000537:         }
000538:         for (const binding of this.mapBindings.splice(0)) {
000539:             try { binding.map.off(binding.types, binding.handler); } catch (err) {}
000540:         }
000541:         for (const restore of this.hookRestorers.splice(0).reverse()) { try { restore(); } catch (err) {} }
000542:         for (const cleanup of this.cleanupCallbacks.splice(0).reverse()) { try { cleanup(reason); } catch (err) {} }
000543:         if (pageWindow[RUNTIME_KEY] === this) {
000544:             try { delete pageWindow[RUNTIME_KEY]; } catch (err) { pageWindow[RUNTIME_KEY] = null; }
000545:         }
000546:         }
000547:     };
000548:     pageWindow[RUNTIME_KEY] = runtime;
000549:     function runtimeSetTimeout(callback, delay = 0, ...args) {
000550:         if (runtime.destroyed) return null;
000551:         let id = null;
000552:         id = pageWindow.setTimeout((...callbackArgs) => {
000553:         runtime.timeouts.delete(id);
000554:         if (!runtime.destroyed) callback(...callbackArgs);
000555:         }, delay, ...args);
000556:         runtime.timeouts.add(id);
000557:         return id;
000558:     }
000559:     function runtimeClearTimeout(id) {
000560:         if (id === null || id === undefined) return;
000561:         runtime.timeouts.delete(id);
000562:         try { pageWindow.clearTimeout(id); } catch (err) {}
000563:     }
000564:     function runtimeDelay(delay = 0) {
000565:         if (runtime.destroyed) return Promise.resolve(false);
000566:         return new Promise(resolve => {
000567:         let timerId = null;
000568:         let settled = false;
000569:         const settle = completed => {
000570:             if (settled) return;
000571:             settled = true;
000572:             runtime.waiters.delete(settle);
000573:             if (timerId !== null) runtimeClearTimeout(timerId);
000574:             resolve(Boolean(completed));
000575:         };
000576:         runtime.waiters.add(settle);
000577:         timerId = runtimeSetTimeout(() => settle(true), Math.max(0, Number(delay) || 0));
000578:         if (timerId === null) settle(false);
000579:         });
000580:     }
000581:     function runtimeSetInterval(callback, delay = 0, ...args) {
000582:         if (runtime.destroyed) return null;
000583:         const id = pageWindow.setInterval((...callbackArgs) => {
000584:         if (!runtime.destroyed) callback(...callbackArgs);
000585:         }, delay, ...args);
000586:         runtime.intervals.add(id);
000587:         return id;
000588:     }
000589:     function runtimeClearInterval(id) {
000590:         if (id === null || id === undefined) return;
000591:         runtime.intervals.delete(id);
000592:         try { pageWindow.clearInterval(id); } catch (err) {}
000593:     }
000594:     function runtimeRequestAnimationFrame(callback) {
000595:         if (runtime.destroyed) return null;
000596:         let id = null;
000597:         id = pageWindow.requestAnimationFrame(timestamp => {
000598:         runtime.animationFrames.delete(id);
000599:         if (!runtime.destroyed) callback(timestamp);
000600:         });
000601:         runtime.animationFrames.add(id);
000602:         return id;
000603:     }
000604:     function runtimeCancelAnimationFrame(id) {
000605:         if (id === null || id === undefined) return;
000606:         runtime.animationFrames.delete(id);
000607:         try { pageWindow.cancelAnimationFrame(id); } catch (err) {}
000608:     }
000609:     function runtimeListen(target, type, listener, options) {
000610:         if (!target?.addEventListener || runtime.destroyed) return listener;
000611:         target.addEventListener(type, listener, options);
000612:         runtime.listeners.push({ target, type, listener, options });
000613:         return listener;
000614:     }
000615:     function runtimeTrackObserver(observer) {
000616:         if (!observer) return observer;
000617:         if (runtime.destroyed) {
000618:         try { observer.disconnect(); } catch (err) {}
000619:         return observer;
000620:         }
000621:         runtime.observers.add(observer);
000622:         return observer;
000623:     }
000624:     function runtimeUntrackObserver(observer, disconnect = true) {
000625:         if (!observer) return;
000626:         if (disconnect) {
000627:         try { observer.disconnect(); } catch (err) {}
000628:         }
000629:         runtime.observers.delete(observer);
000630:     }
000631:     const runtimeTasks = new Map();
000632:     let runtimeTaskTimer = null;
000633:     function runtimeWakeTaskScheduler(delay = 0) {
000634:         runtimeClearTimeout(runtimeTaskTimer);
000635:         runtimeTaskTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(runtimeRunScheduledTasks, Math.max(0, Number(delay) || 0));
000636:     }
000637:     function runtimeRegisterTask(name, intervalMs, callback, options = {}) {
000638:         if (!name || typeof callback !== 'function') return null;
000639:         const interval = Math.max(250, Number(intervalMs) || 1000);
000640:         const initialDelay = Math.max(0, Number(options.initialDelayMs ?? interval) || 0);
000641:         runtimeTasks.set(String(name), {
000642:         name: String(name),
000643:         intervalMs: interval,
000644:         intervalResolver: typeof options.intervalResolver === 'function' ? options.intervalResolver : null,
000645:         economyIntervalMs: Math.max(interval, Number(options.economyIntervalMs) || interval),
000646:         economyIntervalResolver: typeof options.economyIntervalResolver === 'function' ? options.economyIntervalResolver : null,
000647:         callback,
000648:         runWhenHidden: Boolean(options.runWhenHidden),
000649:         nextRun: Date.now() + initialDelay,
000650:         running: false
000651:         });
000652:         runtimeWakeTaskScheduler(0);
000653:         return String(name);
000654:     }
000655: 
000656: 
000657:     function runtimeTaskInterval(task) {
000658:         if (!task) return 1000;
000659:         let resolved = task.intervalMs;
000660:         if (typeof task.intervalResolver === 'function') {
000661:         try { resolved = Number(task.intervalResolver(task)) || resolved; } catch (err) {}
000662:         }
000663:         resolved = Math.max(task.intervalMs, resolved);
000664:         if (!state?.economyMode) return resolved;
000665:         let economyResolved = Math.max(resolved, task.economyIntervalMs || resolved);
000666:         if (typeof task.economyIntervalResolver === 'function') {
000667:         try { economyResolved = Number(task.economyIntervalResolver(task)) || economyResolved; } catch (err) {}
000668:         }
000669:         return Math.max(resolved, economyResolved);
000670:     }
000671:     function runtimeRescheduleTasks(runSoon = false) {
000672:         const now = Date.now();
000673:         for (const task of runtimeTasks.values()) task.nextRun = runSoon ? now : Math.min(task.nextRun, now + runtimeTaskInterval(task));
000674:         runtimeWakeTaskScheduler(runSoon ? 0 : 50);
000675:     }
000676:     function runtimeRunScheduledTasks() {
000677:         runtimeTaskTimer = null;
000678:         if (runtime.destroyed || !runtimeTasks.size) return;
000679:         const now = Date.now();
000680:         const hidden = Boolean(document.hidden);
000681:         let nextDelay = hidden ? 5 * 60 * 1000 : 60000;
000682:         for (const task of runtimeTasks.values()) {
000683:         const dueIn = task.nextRun - now;
000684:         if (dueIn > 0) {
000685:             nextDelay = Math.min(nextDelay, dueIn);
000686:             continue;
000687:         }
000688:         if (hidden && !task.runWhenHidden) {
000689:             const deferredInterval = Math.max(60 * 1000, runtimeTaskInterval(task));
000690:             task.nextRun = now + deferredInterval;
000691:             nextDelay = Math.min(nextDelay, deferredInterval);
000692:             continue;
000693:         }
000694:         const effectiveInterval = runtimeTaskInterval(task);
000695:         task.nextRun = now + effectiveInterval;
000696:         nextDelay = Math.min(nextDelay, effectiveInterval);
000697:         if (task.running) continue;
000698:         task.running = true;
000699:         try {
000700:             const result = task.callback();
000701:             if (result && typeof result.then === 'function') {
000702:                 Promise.resolve(result)
000703:                     .catch(err => console.debug(`[${SCRIPT.name}] Scheduled task ${task.name} failed.`, err))
000704:                     .finally(() => { task.running = false; });
000705:             } else {
000706:                 task.running = false;
000707:             }
000708:         } catch (err) {
000709:             task.running = false;
000710:             console.debug(`[${SCRIPT.name}] Scheduled task ${task.name} failed.`, err);
000711:         }
000712:         }
000713:         runtimeTaskTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(runtimeRunScheduledTasks, Math.max(50, Math.min(hidden ? 5 * 60 * 1000 : 60000, nextDelay)));
000714:     }
000715:     function runtimeOnCleanup(callback) {
000716:         if (typeof callback === 'function') runtime.cleanupCallbacks.push(callback);
000717:         return callback;
000718:     }
000719: 
000720: 
000721:     function runtimeRunWhenIdle(callback, timeout = STARTUP_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS) {
000722:         if (runtime.destroyed || typeof callback !== 'function') return null;
000723:         const maxWait = Math.max(50, Number(timeout) || STARTUP_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS);
000724:         let settled = false;
000725:         let idleId = null;
000726:         let fallbackTimer = null;
000727:         const run = deadline => {
000728:         if (settled || runtime.destroyed) return;
000729:         settled = true;
000730:         if (fallbackTimer !== null) runtimeClearTimeout(fallbackTimer);
000731:         fallbackTimer = null;
000732:         callback(deadline || { didTimeout: true, timeRemaining: () => 0 });
000733:         };
000734:         if (typeof pageWindow.requestIdleCallback === 'function') {
000735:         try {
000736:             idleId = pageWindow.requestIdleCallback(run, { timeout: maxWait });
000737:             fallbackTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => run(null), maxWait + 120);
000738:             runtimeOnCleanup(() => {
000739:                 if (settled || idleId === null || typeof pageWindow.cancelIdleCallback !== 'function') return;
000740:                 try { pageWindow.cancelIdleCallback(idleId); } catch (err) {}
000741:             });
000742:             return idleId;
000743:         } catch (err) {}
000744:         }
000745: 
000746:         fallbackTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => run(null), Math.min(350, maxWait));
000747:         return fallbackTimer;
000748:     }
000749: 
000750:     function startupClock() {
000751:         try { return Number(pageWindow.performance?.now?.()) || Date.now(); }
000752:         catch (err) { return Date.now(); }
000753:     }
000754: 
000755:     function recordStartupMetric(name, startedAt, extra = {}) {
000756:         const finishedAt = startupClock();
000757:         const elapsedMs = Math.max(0, finishedAt - Number(startedAt || finishedAt));
000758:         const metrics = pageWindow.__MCMS_STARTUP_METRICS__ || {};
000759:         metrics.version = SCRIPT.version;
000760:         metrics[name] = Math.round(elapsedMs * 10) / 10;

015151:         if (!nested || typeof nested !== 'object') continue;
015152:         const value = parseCreditValue(nested.average_credits ?? nested.averageCredits ?? nested.average_credit);
015153:         if (value !== null) return value;
015154:         }
015155:         return null;
015156:     }

015158:     function creditsFromMissionPanel(missionId) {
015159:         const panel = getMissionPanelElement(missionId);
015160:         if (!panel) return null;
015161: 
015162:         const selectors = [
015163:         '[average_credits]', '[average-credits]', '[data-average-credits]',
015164:         '[data-average_credits]', '[data-average-credit]', '[data-mission-credits]'
015165:         ];
015166:         const nodes = [panel, ...panel.querySelectorAll(selectors.join(','))];
015167:         const attributes = ['average_credits', 'average-credits', 'data-average-credits', 'data-average_credits', 'data-average-credit', 'data-mission-credits'];
015168: 
015169:         for (const node of nodes) {
015170:         for (const attribute of attributes) {
015171:             const value = parseCreditValue(node.getAttribute?.(attribute));
015172:             if (value !== null) return value;
015173:         }
015174:         }
015175: 
015176:         for (const node of panel.querySelectorAll('span, small, .label, .badge')) {
015177:         const text = String(node.textContent || '').trim();
015178:         if (!/[≈~]/.test(text)) continue;
015179:         const match = text.match(/[≈~]\s*([\d][\d.,\s]*(?:[kKmM])?)/);
015180:         const value = parseCreditValue(match?.[1]);
015181:         if (value !== null) return value;
015182:         }
015183: 
015184:         return null;
015185:     }
015186: 
015187:     function getMissionAverageCredits(marker, missionId) {
015188:         const cached = missionOverlayData.get(missionId);
015189:         if (cached && Number.isFinite(cached.averageCredits)) return cached.averageCredits;
015190: 
015191:         const markerCredits = exactCreditFromObject(marker);
015192:         if (markerCredits !== null) {
015193:         setMissionOverlayRecord(missionId, { ...(cached || {}), averageCredits: markerCredits });
015194:         return markerCredits;
015195:         }
015196: 
015197:         const panelCredits = creditsFromMissionPanel(missionId);
015198:         if (panelCredits !== null) {
015199:         setMissionOverlayRecord(missionId, { ...(cached || {}), averageCredits: panelCredits });
015200:         return panelCredits;
015201:         }
015202: 
015203:         return null;
015204:     }
015205: 
015206:     function missionOwnerId(marker, missionId) {
015207:         const cached = missionOverlayData.get(missionId);
015208:         const panel = getMissionPanelElement(missionId);
015209:         return marker?.user_id ?? marker?.userId ?? marker?.options?.user_id ?? marker?.options?.userId
015210:         ?? cached?.userId
015211:         ?? panel?.getAttribute?.('data-user-id') ?? panel?.getAttribute?.('data-user_id')
015212:         ?? panel?.dataset?.userId ?? null;
015213:     }

015215:     function currentMissionUserId() {
015216:         return currentUserIdCached();
015217:     }
015218: 
015219:     function missionStructuredTypeSignal(marker, missionId, snapshot = null) {
015220:         const id = normaliseMissionId(missionId);
015221:         if (id === null) return '';
015222:         const overlay = missionOverlayData.get(id) || {};
015223:         const panel = document.getElementById(`mission_${id}`);
015224:         const pieces = [];
015225:         const containers = [marker, marker?.options, marker?.params, marker?.mission, marker?.data, overlay, snapshot]
015226:         .filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
015227:         for (const item of containers) {
015228:         for (const key of [
015229:             'mission_type', 'missionType', 'filter_id', 'filterId', 'event_id', 'eventId',
015230:             'event_name', 'eventName', 'event_title', 'eventTitle', 'special_event', 'specialEvent',
015231:             'global_event', 'globalEvent', 'developer_event', 'developerEvent',
015232:             'kind', 'category', 'source', 'alliance_id', 'allianceId', 'alliance_shared_at',
015233:             'allianceSharedAt', 'shared_at', 'sharedAt'
015234:         ]) {
015235:             const value = item[key];
015236:             if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') pieces.push(`${key}:${value}`);
015237:         }
015238:         }
015239:         if (panel) {
015240:         pieces.push(panel.id || '', panel.className || '');
015241:         try {
015242:             for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(panel.dataset || {})) pieces.push(`${key}:${value}`);
015243:         } catch (err) {}
015244:         for (const selector of [
015245:             '[data-mission-type]', '[data-mission_type]', '[data-filter-id]', '[data-filter_id]',
015246:             '[data-event-id]', '[data-event_id]', '[data-event-name]', '[data-event-title]',
015247:             '[data-special-event]', '[data-global-event]', '[data-alliance-id]', '[data-alliance_id]',
015248:             '.mission_event', '.mission-event', '.special-event', '.global-event', '.alliance_mission', '.alliance-mission'
015249:         ]) {
015250:             const node = panel.querySelector?.(selector);
015251:             if (!node) continue;
015252:             pieces.push(node.id || '', node.className || '');
015253:             try {
015254:                 for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(node.dataset || {})) pieces.push(`${key}:${value}`);
015255:             } catch (err) {}
015256:         }
015257:         }
015258:         const icon = marker?._icon;
015259:         if (icon) {
015260:         const signal = getStrongMarkerSignal(icon);
015261:         pieces.push(signal.classes, signal.text, ...signal.hrefs, ...signal.srcs);
015262:         }
015263:         return pieces.join(' ').toLowerCase();
015264:     }
015265: 
015266:     function missionHasExplicitPersonalOwner(marker, missionId) {
015267:         const currentUserId = currentMissionUserId();
015268:         const ownerId = missionOwnerId(marker, missionId);
015269:         return currentUserId !== null && ownerId !== undefined && ownerId !== null && ownerId !== '' && String(ownerId) === currentUserId;
015270:     }
015271: 
015272:     function missionHasExplicitAllianceOwner(marker, missionId) {
015273:         const currentUserId = currentMissionUserId();
015274:         const ownerId = missionOwnerId(marker, missionId);
015275:         return currentUserId !== null && ownerId !== undefined && ownerId !== null && ownerId !== '' && String(ownerId) !== currentUserId;
015276:     }
015277: 
015278:     function isAllianceMissionLayer(marker, missionId, snapshot = null) {
015279:         const id = normaliseMissionId(missionId);
015280:         if (id === null) return false;
015281:         if (missionHasExplicitPersonalOwner(marker, id)) return false;
015282:         if (missionHasExplicitAllianceOwner(marker, id)) return true;
015283:         if (snapshot?.source === 'alliance') return true;
015284:         if (marker?._icon?.classList?.contains('mcms-marker-alliance-mission')) return true;
015285:         if (classifyMarker(marker?._icon) === 'alliance-mission') return true;
015286: 
015287:         const overlay = missionOverlayData.get(id) || {};
015288:         const rawMissionType = String(overlay.missionType ?? marker?.mission_type ?? marker?.missionType ?? marker?.options?.mission_type ?? '').toLowerCase();
015289:         if (/(?:^|[\s_:-])(alliance|alliance_custom|shared_mission|verband|association)(?:$|[\s_:-])/i.test(rawMissionType)) return true;
015290: 
015291:         const signal = missionStructuredTypeSignal(marker, id, snapshot);
015292:         if (/(?:^|[\s_:-])(alliance|alliance_custom|alliance_mission|shared_mission|verband|verbandseinsatz|association)(?:$|[\s_:-])/i.test(signal)) return true;
015293: 
015294:         const allianceId = overlay.allianceId ?? marker?.alliance_id ?? marker?.allianceId ?? marker?.options?.alliance_id;
015295:         const sharedAt = overlay.allianceSharedAt ?? marker?.alliance_shared_at ?? marker?.allianceSharedAt ?? marker?.options?.alliance_shared_at;
015296:         return (allianceId !== undefined && allianceId !== null && allianceId !== '' && String(allianceId) !== '0')
015297:         || (sharedAt !== undefined && sharedAt !== null && sharedAt !== '' && String(sharedAt) !== '0');
015298:     }
015299: 
015300:     function isPersonalMissionLayer(marker, missionId) {
015301:         const id = normaliseMissionId(missionId);
015302:         if (id === null) return false;
015303:         if (missionHasExplicitPersonalOwner(marker, id)) return true;
015304:         if (missionHasExplicitAllianceOwner(marker, id)) return false;
015305:         return Boolean(marker?._icon?.classList?.contains('mcms-marker-my-mission'));
015306:     }
015307: 
015308:     function missionIsEvent(marker, missionId, snapshot = null) {
015309:         const id = normaliseMissionId(missionId);
015310:         if (id === null) return false;
015311:         const overlay = missionOverlayData.get(id) || {};
015312:         const containers = [marker, marker?.options, marker?.params, marker?.mission, marker?.data, overlay, snapshot]
015313:         .filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
015314:         for (const item of containers) {
015315:         const explicit = item.sw ?? item.sicherheitswache ?? item.security_watch ?? item.securityWatch ?? item.is_event ?? item.isEvent ?? item.event;
015316:         if (normaliseMissionBoolean(explicit)) return true;
015317:         const eventId = item.event_id ?? item.eventId;
015318:         if (eventId !== undefined && eventId !== null && eventId !== '' && String(eventId) !== '0' && String(eventId).toLowerCase() !== 'false') return true;
015319:         }
015320:         const signal = missionStructuredTypeSignal(marker, id, snapshot);
015321:         return /(?:^|[\s_:-])(event|event_mission|planned|planned_mission|sicherheitswache|security[\s_:-]?watch|standby|special_event)(?:$|[\s_:-])/i.test(signal);
015322:     }
015323: 
015324:     function activeDeveloperEventLabel() {
015325:         const selectors = [
015326:         '#missions .alert-info', '#missions .alert-success', '#mission_list .alert-info', '#mission_list .alert-success',
015327:         '.missions-panel .alert-info', '.missions-panel .alert-success', '.alert-info', '.alert-success'
015328:         ];
015329:         const seen = new Set();
015330:         for (const selector of selectors) {
015331:         let nodes = [];
015332:         try { nodes = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(selector)).slice(0, 24); } catch (err) {}
015333:         for (const node of nodes) {
015334:             if (!node?.isConnected || seen.has(node)) continue;
015335:             seen.add(node);
015336:             const text = normaliseMissionCaption(String(node.textContent || '')).replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
015337:             if (!text || text.length > 900) continue;
015338:             const related = text.match(/more\s+(.{2,70}?)\s+related\s+missions\s+will\s+(?:show|appear)/i);
015339:             if (related?.[1]) return `${related[1].trim().replace(/\bevent\b/ig, '').trim()} Event`;
015340:             const named = text.match(/(?:special|seasonal|global)\s+event\s*[:\-–—]?\s*([^.!|]{2,70})/i);
015341:             if (named?.[1]) return named[1].trim();
015342:         }
015343:         }
015344:         return '';
015345:     }
015346: 
015347:     function normaliseDeveloperEventLabel(value) {
015348:         const raw = normaliseMissionCaption(value).replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
015349:         if (!raw) return '';
015350:         const cleaned = raw.replace(/^(?:special|seasonal|global|developer)\s+event\s*[:\-–—]?\s*/i, '').trim();
015351:         if (!cleaned) return 'SPECIAL EVENT';
015352:         return /\bevent\b/i.test(cleaned) ? cleaned.toUpperCase() : `${cleaned} EVENT`.toUpperCase();
015353:     }
015354: 
015355:     const FOOTBALL_SPECIAL_EVENT_MISSIONS = new Set([
015356:         'inflate football',
015357:         'team bus parked in no stopping zone',
015358:         'treatment after diving',
015359:         'injury after hitting bar',
015360:         'goal fell down',
015361:         'stolen trophy',
015362:         'frostbite from ice spray',
015363:         'sore throat after celebrating',
015364:         'missing captain armband',
015365:         'burning corner flag',
015366:         'supporters with fireworks on stand',
015367:         'football player slipped in shower',
015368:         'panic in stands',
015369:         'fire in the stadium'
015370:     ]);
015371: 
015372:     function normaliseDeveloperEventMissionTitle(value) {
015373:         return normaliseMissionCaption(value)
015374:         .replace(/^\s*\[\s*event\s*\]\s*/i, '')
015375:         .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
015376:         .trim()
015377:         .toLowerCase();
015378:     }
015379: 
015380:     function knownDeveloperEventFallback(marker, missionId, snapshot = null) {
015381:         const id = normaliseMissionId(missionId);
015382:         if (id === null) return { active: false, label: '', eventId: '' };
015383:         const overlay = missionOverlayData.get(id) || {};
015384:         const title = normaliseDeveloperEventMissionTitle(
015385:         snapshot?.caption ?? overlay.caption ?? getMissionCaption(marker, id)
015386:         );
015387:         if (!title || !missionIsEvent(marker, id, snapshot)) return { active: false, label: '', eventId: '' };
015388:         if (FOOTBALL_SPECIAL_EVENT_MISSIONS.has(title)) {
015389:         return {
015390:             active: true,
015391:             label: 'FOOTBALL EVENT',
015392:             eventId: 'football-title-fallback',
015393:             source: 'known-title'
015394:         };
015395:         }
015396:         return { active: false, label: '', eventId: '' };
015397:     }
015398: 
015399:     function missionDeveloperEventInfo(marker, missionId, snapshot = null) {
015400:         const id = normaliseMissionId(missionId);
015401:         if (id === null) return { active: false, label: '', eventId: '' };
015402:         const overlay = missionOverlayData.get(id) || {};
015403:         const containers = [marker, marker?.options, marker?.params, marker?.mission, marker?.data, overlay, snapshot]
015404:         .filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
015405:         let eventId = '';
015406:         let eventName = '';
015407:         let explicitSpecial = false;
015408:         for (const item of containers) {
015409:         const rawEventId = item.event_id ?? item.eventId ?? item.global_event_id ?? item.globalEventId ?? item.active_event_id ?? item.activeEventId;
015410:         if (rawEventId !== undefined && rawEventId !== null && rawEventId !== '' && String(rawEventId) !== '0' && String(rawEventId).toLowerCase() !== 'false') eventId = String(rawEventId);
015411:         const rawName = item.event_name ?? item.eventName ?? item.event_title ?? item.eventTitle ?? item.event_caption ?? item.eventCaption;
015412:         if (!eventName && rawName !== undefined && rawName !== null && String(rawName).trim()) eventName = String(rawName);
015413:         const rawSpecial = item.special_event ?? item.specialEvent ?? item.is_special_event ?? item.isSpecialEvent ?? item.global_event ?? item.globalEvent ?? item.developer_event ?? item.developerEvent;
015414:         if (normaliseMissionBoolean(rawSpecial)) explicitSpecial = true;
015415:         }
015416:         const signal = missionStructuredTypeSignal(marker, id, snapshot);
015417:         const signalSpecial = /(?:^|[\s_:-])(special_event|global_event|seasonal_event|developer_event|world_event)(?:$|[\s_:-])/i.test(signal);
015418:         const active = Boolean(eventId || explicitSpecial || signalSpecial);
015419:         if (!active) return knownDeveloperEventFallback(marker, id, snapshot);
015420:         const label = normaliseDeveloperEventLabel(eventName || activeDeveloperEventLabel() || 'SPECIAL EVENT');
015421:         return { active: true, label: label || 'SPECIAL EVENT', eventId, source: 'structured' };
015422:     }
015423: 
015424:     function missionWatchOwnership(marker, missionId, snapshot = null) {
015425:         const id = normaliseMissionId(missionId);
015426:         if (id === null) return 'personal';
015427:         const explicit = String(snapshot?.ownership || '').toLowerCase();
015428:         if (CRITICAL_OWNERSHIP_KEYS.includes(explicit)) return explicit;
015429:         if (missionHasExplicitPersonalOwner(marker, id)) return 'personal';
015430:         if (isAllianceMissionLayer(marker, id, snapshot) || snapshot?.source === 'alliance') return 'alliance';
015431:         if (isPersonalMissionLayer(marker, id)) return 'personal';
015432:         return 'personal';
015433:     }
015434: 
015435: 
015436:     function missionWatchCategory(marker, missionId, snapshot = null, specialEvent = null) {
015437:         const explicit = String(snapshot?.category || '').toLowerCase();
015438:         if (CRITICAL_CATEGORY_KEYS.includes(explicit)) return explicit;
015439:         const special = specialEvent || missionDeveloperEventInfo(marker, missionId, snapshot);
015440:         if (special?.active) return 'special';
015441:         if (missionIsEvent(marker, missionId, snapshot)) return 'event';
015442:         return 'standard';
015443:     }
015444: 
015445:     function missionWatchOwnershipLabel(type) {
015446:         return type === 'alliance' ? 'ALLIANCE' : 'PERSONAL';
015447:     }
015448: 
015449: 
015450:     function missionWatchCategoryLabel(category) {
015451:         if (category === 'special') return 'SPECIAL EVENT';
015452:         if (category === 'event') return 'TIMED EVENT';
015453:         return 'STANDARD';
015454:     }
015455: 
015456:     function formatAllianceCredits(value) {
015457:         const credits = Math.max(0, Math.round(Number(value) || 0));
015458:         const trim = number => String(number).replace(/\.0+$|(\.\d*[1-9])0+$/, '$1');
015459: 
015460:         if (credits < 1000) return String(credits);
015461:         if (credits < 10000) return `${trim((credits / 1000).toFixed(credits % 1000 === 0 ? 0 : 2))}k`;
015462:         if (credits < 999500) return `${trim((credits / 1000).toFixed(credits % 1000 === 0 ? 0 : 1))}k`;
015463:         return `${trim((credits / 1000000).toFixed(credits % 1000000 === 0 ? 0 : credits < 10000000 ? 2 : 1))}m`;
015464:     }
015465: 
015466:     function ensureMissionFloatPane(map) {
015467:         if (!map || typeof map.getPane !== 'function' || typeof map.createPane !== 'function') return null;
015468: 
015469:         let pane = null;
015470:         try { pane = map.getPane(MISSION_OVERLAY_PANE); } catch (err) {}
015471:         if (!pane) {
015472:         try { pane = map.createPane(MISSION_OVERLAY_PANE); } catch (err) { pane = null; }
015473:         }
015474:         if (!pane) return null;
015475: 
015476:         pane.classList.add('mcms-mission-float-pane');
015477:         pane.style.setProperty('z-index', '750');
015478:         pane.style.setProperty('pointer-events', 'none');
015479:         pane.style.setProperty('touch-action', 'none');
015480:         return MISSION_OVERLAY_PANE;
015481:     }
015482: 
015483:     function clearAllianceCreditLabels() {
015484:         if (allianceCreditGroup) {
015485:         try { allianceCreditGroup.clearLayers(); allianceCreditGroup.remove(); } catch (err) {}
015486:         }
015487:         allianceCreditLabels.clear();
015488:         allianceCreditGroup = null;
015489:     }
015490: 
015491:     function missionVehicleStateFromObject(source) {
015492:         if (!source || typeof source !== 'object') return null;
015493:         const containers = [source, source.options, source.params, source.mission, source.data, source.missionData, source._missionData]
015494:         .filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
015495: 
015496:         for (const item of containers) {
015497:         const value = Number(item.vehicle_state ?? item.vehicleState);
015498:         if (Number.isFinite(value)) return value;
015499:         }
015500:         return null;
015501:     }
015502: 
015503:     function vehicleAssignedMissionId(vehicle) {
015504:         if (!vehicle || typeof vehicle !== 'object') return null;
015505:         const containers = [vehicle, vehicle.options, vehicle.params, vehicle.vehicle, vehicle.data, vehicle.vehicleData, vehicle._vehicleData]
015506:         .filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
015507:         const keys = ['mission_id', 'missionId', 'target_mission_id', 'targetMissionId'];
015508: 
015509:         for (const item of containers) {
015510:         const targetType = String(item.target_type ?? item.targetType ?? '').toLowerCase();
015511:         if (targetType === 'mission') {
015512:             const targetMissionId = normaliseMissionId(item.target_id ?? item.targetId);
015513:             if (targetMissionId !== null && targetMissionId !== '0') return targetMissionId;
015514:         }
015515:         for (const key of keys) {
015516:             const missionId = normaliseMissionId(item[key]);
015517:             if (missionId !== null && missionId !== '0') return missionId;
015518:         }
015519:         }
015520:         return null;
015521:     }
015522: 
015523:     function vehicleOwnerId(vehicle) {
015524:         if (!vehicle || typeof vehicle !== 'object') return null;
015525:         const containers = [vehicle, vehicle.options, vehicle.params, vehicle.vehicle, vehicle.data, vehicle.vehicleData, vehicle._vehicleData]
015526:         .filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
015527: 
015528:         for (const item of containers) {
015529:         const value = item.user_id ?? item.userId ?? item.owner_id ?? item.ownerId;
015530:         if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') return String(value);
015531:         }
015532:         return null;
015533:     }
015534: 
015535:     function vehicleRecordId(vehicle) {
015536:         if (!vehicle || typeof vehicle !== 'object') return null;
015537:         const containers = [vehicle, vehicle.options, vehicle.params, vehicle.vehicle, vehicle.data, vehicle.vehicleData, vehicle._vehicleData]
015538:         .filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
015539:         for (const item of containers) {
015540:         const value = item.id ?? item.vehicle_id ?? item.vehicleId;
015541:         if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') return String(value);
015542:         }
015543:         return null;
015544:     }
015545: 
015546:     function normaliseVehicleApiPayload(payload) {
015547:         if (Array.isArray(payload)) return payload.filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
015548:         if (Array.isArray(payload?.result)) return payload.result.filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
015549:         if (payload && typeof payload === 'object') return Object.values(payload).filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
015550:         return [];
015551:     }
015552: 
015553:     function getPersonalVehicleRecords() {
015554:         const now = Date.now();
015555:         if (
015556:         personalVehicleRecordsCache.vehicleRevision === vehicleDataRevision &&
015557:         personalVehicleRecordsCache.markerRevision === vehicleRegistryRevision &&
015558:         personalVehicleRecordsCache.apiReady === vehicleApiReady &&
015559:         (vehicleApiReady || now - personalVehicleRecordsCache.createdAt <= 1000)
015560:         ) return personalVehicleRecordsCache.records;
015561: 
015562:         let records;
015563:         if (vehicleApiReady) {
015564:         records = Array.from(personalVehicleApiCache.values());
015565:         } else {
015566:         const merged = new Map(personalVehicleApiCache);
015567:         const currentUserId = currentMissionUserId();
015568:         for (const vehicle of getVehicleMarkerLayers()) {
015569:             const ownerId = vehicleOwnerId(vehicle);
015570:             if (currentUserId !== null && ownerId !== null && ownerId !== currentUserId) continue;
015571:             const id = vehicleRecordId(vehicle) || `marker:${vehicle?._leaflet_id ?? merged.size}`;
015572:             if (!merged.has(id)) merged.set(id, vehicle);
015573:         }
015574:         records = Array.from(merged.values());
015575:         }
015576:         personalVehicleRecordsCache = {
015577:         vehicleRevision: vehicleDataRevision,
015578:         markerRevision: vehicleRegistryRevision,
015579:         apiReady: vehicleApiReady,
015580:         createdAt: now,
015581:         records
015582:         };
015583:         return records;
015584:     }
015585: 
015586:     function invalidateMissionCommitmentIndex() {
015587:         missionCommitmentIndexDirty = true;
015588:     }
015589: 
015590:     function rebuildMissionCommitmentIndex() {
015591:         if (!missionCommitmentIndexDirty) return missionCommitmentIndex;
015592: 
015593:         missionCommitmentIndex.clear();
015594:         const seenVehicles = new Set();
015595:         const currentUserId = currentMissionUserId();
015596: 
015597:         for (const vehicle of getPersonalVehicleRecords()) {
015598:         const missionId = vehicleAssignedMissionId(vehicle);
015599:         if (missionId === null) continue;
015600: 
015601:         if (!vehicleApiReady) {
015602:             const ownerId = vehicleOwnerId(vehicle);
015603:             if (currentUserId !== null && ownerId !== null && ownerId !== currentUserId) continue;
015604:         }
015605: 
015606:         const vehicleId = vehicleRecordId(vehicle) || `anon:${seenVehicles.size}`;
015607:         if (seenVehicles.has(vehicleId)) continue;
015608:         seenVehicles.add(vehicleId);
015609: 
015610:         let commitment = missionCommitmentIndex.get(missionId);
015611:         if (!commitment) {
015612:             commitment = {
015613:                 total: 0,
015614:                 active: 0,
015615:                 onScene: 0,
015616:                 onWay: 0,
015617:                 travelling: 0,
015618:                 transporting: 0,
015619:                 awaitingPickup: 0,
015620:                 requestingDispatch: 0,
015621:                 outOfService: 0,
015622:                 available: 0,
015623:                 unknownStatus: 0
015624:             };
015625:             missionCommitmentIndex.set(missionId, commitment);
015626:         }
015627: 
015628:         commitment.total += 1;
015629:         const code = vehicleStatusCode(vehicle);
015630:         if (code === 3) {
015631:             commitment.onWay += 1;
015632:             commitment.travelling += 1;
015633:             commitment.active += 1;
015634:         } else if (code === 4) {
015635:             commitment.onScene += 1;
015636:             commitment.active += 1;
015637:         } else if (code === 7) {
015638:             commitment.transporting += 1;
015639:             commitment.active += 1;
015640:         } else if (code === 9) {
015641:             commitment.awaitingPickup += 1;
015642:             commitment.active += 1;
015643:         } else if (code === 5) commitment.requestingDispatch += 1;
015644:         else if (code === 6) commitment.outOfService += 1;
015645:         else if (code === 1 || code === 2) commitment.available += 1;
015646:         else commitment.unknownStatus += 1;
015647:         }
015648: 
015649:         missionCommitmentIndexDirty = false;
015650:         return missionCommitmentIndex;
015651:     }
015652: 
015653:     function refreshPersonalVehicleData(force = false) {
015654:         const now = Date.now();
015655:         if (vehicleApiFetchPromise) return vehicleApiFetchPromise;
015656:         if (!force && vehicleApiLastError && now - vehicleApiLastError < VEHICLE_API_ERROR_BACKOFF_MS) return Promise.resolve(false);
015657:         if (!force && vehicleApiReady && now - vehicleApiLastFetch < VEHICLE_API_MIN_REFRESH_MS) return Promise.resolve(true);
015658: 
015659:         vehicleApiFetchPromise = runtimeFetch(new URL('/api/vehicles', document.baseURI || pageWindow.location.href), {
015660:         credentials: 'same-origin',
015661:         cache: 'no-store',
015662:         headers: { Accept: 'application/json' }
015663:         })
015664:         .then(response => {
015665:             if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`Vehicle API ${response.status}`);
015666:             return response.json();
015667:         })
015668:         .then(payload => {
015669:             const records = normaliseVehicleApiPayload(payload);
015670:             const next = new Map();
015671:             for (const vehicle of records) {
015672:                 const id = vehicleRecordId(vehicle);
015673:                 if (id !== null) next.set(id, vehicle);
015674:             }
015675:             personalVehicleApiCache.clear();
015676:             for (const [id, vehicle] of next) personalVehicleApiCache.set(id, vehicle);
015677:             vehicleApiReady = true;
015678:             vehicleApiLastFetch = Date.now();
015679:             vehicleStatusLastUpdate = vehicleApiLastFetch;
015680:             vehicleApiLastError = 0;
015681:             vehicleDataRevision += 1;
015682:             invalidateMarkerRegistryCaches('vehicle');
015683:             invalidateMissionCommitmentIndex();
015684:             rebuildMissionCommitmentIndex();
015685:             resourceGapAnalysisCache.clear();
015686:             resourceGapVehicleContextCache.key = '';
015687:             if (!startupDataPassActive) {
015688:                 if (state.unitCommitment) scheduleUnitCommitmentRefresh(280);
015689:                 scheduleMissionSnapshotRefresh(650);
015690:                 if (state.resourceGap.enabled) scheduleResourceGapRefresh(520);
015691:                 if (operationalUiIsVisible()) scheduleOperationalPanelsRender(750);
015692:                 if (criticalViewActive) runtimeSetTimeout(() => { applyCriticalViewFilter(); fitCriticalMissions(); }, 320);
015693:             }
015694:             return true;
015695:         })
015696:         .catch(() => {
015697:             vehicleApiLastError = Date.now();
015698:             return false;
015699:         })
015700:         .finally(() => { vehicleApiFetchPromise = null; });
015701: 
015702:         return vehicleApiFetchPromise;
015703:     }
015704: 
015705:     function captureRadioVehicleMessage(message) {
015706:         if (!message || typeof message !== 'object' || message.type !== 'vehicle_fms') return;
015707:         const currentUserId = currentMissionUserId();
015708:         if (currentUserId !== null && message.user_id !== undefined && String(message.user_id) !== currentUserId) return;
015709:         const id = vehicleRecordId(message);
015710:         if (id === null) return;
015711: 
015712:         const existing = personalVehicleApiCache.get(id) || {};
015713:         const targetType = Number(message.target_building_id) > 0 ? 'building' : Number(message.mission_id) > 0 ? 'mission' : null;
015714:         const targetId = targetType === 'building' ? message.target_building_id : targetType === 'mission' ? message.mission_id : null;
015715:         personalVehicleApiCache.set(id, {
015716:         ...existing,
015717:         id: Number.isFinite(Number(message.id)) ? Number(message.id) : message.id,
015718:         caption: message.caption ?? existing.caption,
015719:         fms_real: Number.isFinite(Number(message.fms_real)) ? Number(message.fms_real) : existing.fms_real,
015720:         fms_show: Number.isFinite(Number(message.fms)) ? Number(message.fms) : existing.fms_show,
015721:         target_type: targetType,
015722:         target_id: targetId
015723:         });
015724:         vehicleDataRevision += 1;
015725:         vehicleStatusLastUpdate = Date.now();
015726:         invalidateMarkerRegistryCaches('vehicle');
015727:         invalidateMissionCommitmentIndex();
015728:         resourceGapAnalysisCache.clear();
015729:         resourceGapVehicleContextCache.key = '';
015730:         if (state.unitCommitment) scheduleUnitCommitmentRefresh(500);
015731:         scheduleMissionSnapshotRefresh(850);
015732:         if (state.resourceGap.enabled) scheduleResourceGapRefresh(900);
015733:         if (operationalUiIsVisible()) scheduleOperationalPanelsRender(1000);
015734:     }
015735: 
015736:     function installRadioMessageHook() {
015737:         let current;
015738:         try { current = pageWindow.radioMessage; } catch (err) { return false; }
015739:         if (typeof current !== 'function') return false;
015740:         if (current.__mcmsVehicleDataWrappedV313) return true;
015741: 
015742:         const original = current.__mcmsOriginal || current;
015743:         const wrapped = function (...args) {
015744:         for (const arg of args) captureRadioVehicleMessage(arg);
015745:         return original.apply(this, args);
015746:         };
015747:         try {
015748:         Object.defineProperty(wrapped, '__mcmsVehicleDataWrappedV313', { value: true });
015749:         Object.defineProperty(wrapped, '__mcmsOriginal', { value: original });
015750:         pageWindow.radioMessage = wrapped;
015751:         if (pageWindow.radioMessage !== wrapped) return false;
015752:         runtime.hookRestorers.push(() => {
015753:             try {
015754:                 if (pageWindow.radioMessage === wrapped) pageWindow.radioMessage = original;
015755:             } catch (err) {}
015756:         });
015757:         return true;
015758:         } catch (err) {
015759:         return false;
015760:         }

===== vehicle identity and matrix: 22170-22390 =====
022170:         };
022171: 
022172:         const allGroups = Array.from(source?.querySelectorAll?.('[data-requirement-type]') || []);
022173:         const groupElements = allGroups.filter(element => {
022174:         const closest = element.closest?.('#missing_text');
022175:         return !closest || closest === source;
022176:         });
022177:         if (groupElements.length) {
022178:         for (const element of groupElements) {
022179:             const rawGroup = element.getAttribute?.('data-requirement-type') || element.dataset?.requirementType || 'vehicles';
022180:             parseSection(missionRequirementsElementText(element), rawGroup);
022181:         }
022182:         } else {
022183:         const raw = missionRequirementsElementText(source);
022184:         for (const section of missionRequirementsSplitTextSections(raw, 'vehicles')) parseSection(section.text, section.group);
022185:         }
022186:         return { requirements, unresolved };
022187:     }
022188: 
022189:     function missionRequirementsVehicleType(element) {
022190:         const scopes = [];
022191:         const addScope = scope => {
022192:         if (scope && !scopes.includes(scope)) scopes.push(scope);
022193:         };
022194:         addScope(element);
022195:         addScope(element?.closest?.('tr'));
022196:         addScope(element?.closest?.('[vehicle_type_id], [data-vehicle-type-id], [data-vehicle_type_id]'));
022197:         const read = scope => missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(
022198:         scope?.getAttribute?.('vehicle_type_id')
022199:         ?? scope?.getAttribute?.('data-vehicle-type-id')
022200:         ?? scope?.getAttribute?.('data-vehicle_type_id')
022201:         ?? scope?.dataset?.vehicleTypeId
022202:         ?? scope?.dataset?.vehicle_type_id
022203:         );
022204:         for (const scope of scopes) {
022205:         const direct = read(scope);
022206:         if (direct !== null && direct >= 0) return direct;
022207:         const nested = scope?.querySelector?.('[vehicle_type_id], [data-vehicle-type-id], [data-vehicle_type_id]');
022208:         const nestedType = read(nested);
022209:         if (nestedType !== null && nestedType >= 0) return nestedType;
022210:         }
022211:         return -1;
022212:     }
022213: 
022214:     function missionRequirementsVehicleId(element) {
022215:         const scopes = Array.from(new Set([element, element?.closest?.('tr')].filter(Boolean)));
022216:         const attributes = ['vehicle_id', 'data-vehicle-id', 'data-vehicle_id'];
022217:         for (const scope of scopes) {
022218:         for (const raw of [scope?.value, scope?.getAttribute?.('value'), scope?.dataset?.vehicleId, scope?.dataset?.vehicle_id]) {
022219:             const value = Number.parseInt(raw, 10);
022220:             if (Number.isFinite(value) && value >= 0) return value;
022221:         }
022222:         for (const attribute of attributes) {
022223:             const value = Number.parseInt(scope?.getAttribute?.(attribute), 10);
022224:             if (Number.isFinite(value) && value >= 0) return value;
022225:         }
022226:         const idMatch = String(scope?.id || '').match(/(?:^|[_-])vehicle[_-]?(\d+)(?:$|[_-])/iu);
022227:         if (idMatch) return Number(idMatch[1]);
022228:         const link = scope?.matches?.('a[href*="/vehicles/"]') ? scope : scope?.querySelector?.('a[href*="/vehicles/"]');
022229:         const hrefMatch = String(link?.getAttribute?.('href') || link?.href || '').match(/\/vehicles\/(\d+)(?:\/|$)/u);
022230:         if (hrefMatch) return Number(hrefMatch[1]);
022231:         }
022232:         return -1;
022233:     }
022234: 
022235:     function missionRequirementsEquipmentTypes(element) {
022236:         const values = new Set();
022237:         const add = raw => String(raw || '').split(',').map(value => value.trim().toLowerCase()).filter(Boolean).forEach(value => values.add(value));
022238:         const scopes = Array.from(new Set([element, element?.closest?.('tr')].filter(Boolean)));
022239:         for (const scope of scopes) {
022240:         add(scope?.dataset?.equipmentType);
022241:         add(scope?.dataset?.equipmentTypes);
022242:         add(scope?.getAttribute?.('data-equipment-type'));
022243:         add(scope?.getAttribute?.('data-equipment-types'));
022244:         scope?.querySelectorAll?.('[data-equipment-type], [data-equipment-types]').forEach(node => {
022245:             add(node.getAttribute('data-equipment-type'));
022246:             add(node.getAttribute('data-equipment-types'));
022247:         });
022248:         }
022249:         return values;
022250:     }
022251: 
022252:     function missionRequirementsStaffCapacity(element) {
022253:         const row = element?.closest?.('tr') || element;
022254:         const crewCell = row?.querySelector?.('[data-personnel-count], [data-current-personnel], [data-min-personnel], [data-max-personnel], [data-min-crew], [data-max-crew], td:nth-of-type(5)[sortvalue]');
022255:         const scopes = Array.from(new Set([element, row, crewCell].filter(Boolean)));
022256:         const exactAttributes = ['data-personnel-count', 'data-current-personnel', 'data-personnel', 'data-staff', 'data-crew'];
022257:         for (const scope of scopes) {
022258:         for (const attribute of exactAttributes) {
022259:             const value = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(scope.getAttribute?.(attribute));
022260:             if (value !== null) return missionRequirementsCapacity(value, value, true);
022261:         }
022262:         }
022263:         let min = null;
022264:         let max = null;
022265:         for (const scope of scopes) {
022266:         if (min === null) min = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(scope.getAttribute?.('data-min-personnel') ?? scope.getAttribute?.('data-min-crew'));
022267:         if (max === null) max = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(scope.getAttribute?.('data-max-personnel') ?? scope.getAttribute?.('data-max-crew'));
022268:         }
022269:         if (min !== null || max !== null) return missionRequirementsCapacity(min ?? 0, max, min !== null && max !== null && min === max);
022270:         const text = String(crewCell?.textContent || '').trim();
022271:         const currentMaximum = text.match(/(\d[\d,.]*)\s*\/\s*(\d[\d,.]*)/u);
022272:         if (currentMaximum) {
022273:         const current = missionRequirementsNumber(currentMaximum[1]);
022274:         return missionRequirementsCapacity(current, current, true);
022275:         }
022276:         const bounded = text.match(/(\d[\d,.]*)\s*(?:-|–|to)\s*(\d[\d,.]*)/iu);
022277:         if (bounded) return missionRequirementsCapacity(missionRequirementsNumber(bounded[1]), missionRequirementsNumber(bounded[2]), false);
022278:         const visible = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(text);
022279:         if (visible !== null) return missionRequirementsCapacity(visible, visible, true);
022280:         const sortValue = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(crewCell?.getAttribute?.('sortvalue'));
022281:         if (sortValue !== null) return missionRequirementsCapacity(sortValue, sortValue, true);
022282:         return null;
022283:     }
022284: 
022285:     function missionRequirementsCollectUnits(candidate, mode) {
022286:         const root = candidate?.root;
022287:         const doc = candidate?.source?.ownerDocument || root?.ownerDocument;
022288:         if (!root?.querySelectorAll && !doc?.querySelectorAll) return [];
022289:         const selector = mode === 'selected'
022290:             ? '#vehicle_show_table_body_all .vehicle_checkbox:checked, #occupied .vehicle_checkbox:checked, .vehicle_checkbox:checked'
022291:             : mode === 'onsite'
022292:                 ? '#mission_vehicle_at_mission tbody tr'
022293:                 : '#mission_vehicle_driving tbody tr';
022294:         const elements = [];
022295:         const seenElements = new Set();
022296:         const missionScopes = Array.from(new Set([root, candidate?.mount].filter(scope => scope?.querySelectorAll)));
022297:         const scopes = missionScopes.length ? missionScopes : [doc].filter(scope => scope?.querySelectorAll);
022298:         for (const scope of scopes) {
022299:             for (const element of Array.from(scope.querySelectorAll?.(selector) || [])) {
022300:                 if (seenElements.has(element)) continue;
022301:                 seenElements.add(element);
022302:                 elements.push(element);
022303:             }
022304:         }
022305: 
022306:         const units = new Map();
022307:         elements.forEach((element, index) => {
022308:             const row = element.matches?.('tr') ? element : element.closest?.('tr');
022309:             const vehicleElement = mode === 'selected'
022310:                 ? element
022311:                 : (element.querySelector?.('[vehicle_type_id], [data-vehicle-type-id], [data-vehicle_type_id]') || element);
022312:             const typeId = missionRequirementsVehicleType(vehicleElement);
022313:             if (typeId < 0) return;
022314:             const vehicleId = missionRequirementsVehicleId(vehicleElement);
022315:             const tractiveId = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(
022316:                 vehicleElement?.getAttribute?.('tractive_vehicle_id')
022317:                 ?? vehicleElement?.getAttribute?.('data-tractive-vehicle-id')
022318:                 ?? row?.getAttribute?.('tractive_vehicle_id')
022319:                 ?? row?.getAttribute?.('data-tractive-vehicle-id')
022320:                 ?? row?.dataset?.tractiveVehicleId
022321:             );
022322:             const trailerId = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(
022323:                 vehicleElement?.getAttribute?.('trailer_id')
022324:                 ?? vehicleElement?.getAttribute?.('data-trailer-id')
022325:                 ?? row?.getAttribute?.('trailer_id')
022326:                 ?? row?.getAttribute?.('data-trailer-id')
022327:                 ?? row?.dataset?.trailerId
022328:             );
022329:             let contributionKey = vehicleId >= 0 ? `vehicle:${vehicleId}` : `element:${index}`;
022330:             const pairedId = tractiveId !== null && tractiveId >= 0 ? tractiveId : trailerId;
022331:             if (vehicleId >= 0 && pairedId !== null && pairedId >= 0) contributionKey = `pair:${Math.min(vehicleId, pairedId)}:${Math.max(vehicleId, pairedId)}`;
022332:             const identityKey = vehicleId >= 0 ? `vehicle:${vehicleId}` : contributionKey;
022333:             const unit = {
022334:                 typeId,
022335:                 vehicleId,
022336:                 tractiveId,
022337:                 equipment: missionRequirementsEquipmentTypes(vehicleElement),
022338:                 staff: missionRequirementsStaffCapacity(vehicleElement),
022339:                 contributionKey
022340:             };
022341:             const existing = units.get(identityKey);
022342:             if (!existing) {
022343:                 units.set(identityKey, unit);
022344:                 return;
022345:             }
022346:             if (existing.typeId < 0 && unit.typeId >= 0) existing.typeId = unit.typeId;
022347:             for (const equipment of unit.equipment) existing.equipment.add(equipment);
022348:             if ((!existing.staff || !existing.staff.known) && unit.staff?.known) existing.staff = unit.staff;
022349:             if (existing.contributionKey.startsWith('element:') && !unit.contributionKey.startsWith('element:')) existing.contributionKey = unit.contributionKey;
022350:         });
022351:         return Array.from(units.values());
022352:     }
022353: 
022354:     function missionRequirementsMissionTypeId(candidate) {
022355:         const scopes = [candidate?.root, candidate?.mount].filter(Boolean);
022356:         const attributes = ['mission_type_id', 'data-mission-type-id', 'data-mission_type_id'];
022357:         for (const scope of scopes) {
022358:         for (const attribute of attributes) {
022359:             const value = Number.parseInt(scope.getAttribute?.(attribute), 10);
022360:             if (Number.isFinite(value) && value >= 0) return value;
022361:         }
022362:         const node = scope.querySelector?.('[mission_type_id], [data-mission-type-id], [data-mission_type_id], input[name="mission_type_id"]');
022363:         if (node) {
022364:             for (const raw of [node.getAttribute?.('mission_type_id'), node.getAttribute?.('data-mission-type-id'), node.getAttribute?.('data-mission_type_id'), node.value]) {
022365:                 const value = Number.parseInt(raw, 10);
022366:                 if (Number.isFinite(value) && value >= 0) return value;
022367:             }
022368:         }
022369:         }
022370:         const runtimeValue = Number.parseInt(pageWindow.missionTypeId ?? pageWindow.mission_type_id, 10);
022371:         return Number.isFinite(runtimeValue) && runtimeValue >= 0 ? runtimeValue : null;
022372:     }
022373: 
022374:     function missionRequirementsDefinitionCondition(definition, candidate) {
022375:         const included = Array.from(definition?.missionTypes || []).map(Number).filter(Number.isFinite);
022376:         const excluded = Array.from(definition?.excludedMissionTypes || []).map(Number).filter(Number.isFinite);
022377:         if (!included.length && !excluded.length) return true;
022378:         const missionTypeId = missionRequirementsMissionTypeId(candidate);
022379:         if (missionTypeId === null) return null;
022380:         if (included.length && !included.includes(missionTypeId)) return false;
022381:         if (excluded.includes(missionTypeId)) return false;
022382:         return true;
022383:     }
022384: 
022385:     function missionRequirementsUnitContribution(requirement, unit) {
022386:         const definition = requirement.definition || {};
022387:         const typeEligible = Array.from(definition.types || []).includes(unit.typeId);
022388:         const equipmentEligible = Array.from(definition.equipment || []).some(equipment => unit.equipment.has(String(equipment).toLowerCase()));
022389:         if (!typeEligible && !equipmentEligible) return { eligible: false, capacity: missionRequirementsCapacity(0, 0, true) };
022390:         if (requirement.group === 'staff') {

===== mission window observers: 23470-23640 =====
023470:         }
023471:     }
023472: 
023473:     function scheduleMissionRequirementsScan(delay = 60) {
023474:         runtimeClearTimeout(missionRequirementsScanTimer);
023475:         missionRequirementsScanTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
023476:             missionRequirementsScanTimer = null;
023477:             scanMissionRequirementsWindows();
023478:         }, Math.max(0, Number(delay) || 0));
023479:     }
023480: 
023481:     function scanMissionRequirementsWindows() {
023482:         if (runtime.destroyed || !missionRequirementsPrimaryRuntime()) return;
023483:         if (!state.missionRequirements) {
023484:             clearMissionRequirementsPanels();
023485:             return;
023486:         }
023487:         const activeSources = new Set();
023488:         const activeDocuments = new WeakSet();
023489:         for (const candidate of missionRequirementsWindowCandidates()) {
023490:             const source = missionRequirementsSourceForCandidate(candidate) || missionRequirementsAnchorForCandidate(candidate);
023491:             if (!source || source.isConnected === false) continue;
023492:             const doc = source.ownerDocument || candidate?.root?.ownerDocument || document;
023493:             if (!doc || activeDocuments.has(doc)) continue;
023494:             activeDocuments.add(doc);
023495:             ensureMissionRequirementsDocumentStyle(doc);
023496:             if (missionRequirementsLssmActive(candidate, source)) {
023497:                 missionRequirementsRemoveRecord(source);
023498:                 continue;
023499:             }
023500:             activeSources.add(source);
023501:             missionRequirementsEnsureRecord({ ...candidate, source }, source);
023502:         }
023503:         for (const source of Array.from(missionRequirementsRecords.keys())) {
023504:             if (source.isConnected === false || !activeSources.has(source)) missionRequirementsRemoveRecord(source);
023505:         }
023506:     }
023507: 
023508:     function missionRequirementsScheduleDocumentRecords(doc) {
023509:         for (const record of missionRequirementsRecords.values()) {
023510:             if (record.source?.ownerDocument === doc) missionRequirementsScheduleRecord(record);
023511:         }
023512:     }
023513: 
023514:     function observeMissionRequirementsFrame(frame) {
023515:         if (!frame || missionRequirementsObservedFrames.has(frame)) return;
023516:         missionRequirementsObservedFrames.add(frame);
023517:         const onLoad = () => scheduleMissionRequirementsScan(20);
023518:         frame.addEventListener('load', onLoad);
023519:         runtimeOnCleanup(() => frame.removeEventListener('load', onLoad));
023520:     }
023521: 
023522:     function observeMissionRequirementsDocument(doc) {
023523:         if (!doc) return;
023524:         ensureMissionRequirementsDocumentStyle(doc);
023525:         if (missionRequirementsObservedDocuments.has(doc)) return;
023526:         missionRequirementsObservedDocuments.add(doc);
023527:         try { doc.querySelectorAll('iframe, frame').forEach(observeMissionRequirementsFrame); } catch (err) {}
023528:         runtimeListen(doc, 'change', event => {
023529:             if (!event.target?.matches?.('.vehicle_checkbox, input[type="checkbox"][vehicle_type_id]')) return;
023530:             missionRequirementsScheduleDocumentRecords(doc);
023531:         }, true);
023532:         const root = doc.documentElement || doc.body;
023533:         if (!root) return;
023534:         const activitySelector = '#missing_text, [data-mcms-requirements-anchor], #mission_vehicle_driving, #mission_vehicle_at_mission, #vehicle_show_table_body_all, #occupied, .vehicle_checkbox, [vehicle_type_id], [data-vehicle-type-id], [data-vehicle_type_id], [data-equipment-types], [data-equipment-type], [data-current-personnel], [data-min-personnel], [data-max-personnel], [id^="mission_water_holder"], [id^="mission_foam_holder"], [id^="mission_pump_holder"], #lightbox_box, #lightbox, .lightbox_content, .modal, [role="dialog"], .ui-dialog, iframe, frame';
023535:         const view = doc.defaultView || pageWindow;
023536:         const MutationObserverCtor = view?.MutationObserver || pageWindow.MutationObserver || MutationObserver;
023537:         const observer = runtimeTrackObserver(new MutationObserverCtor(mutations => {
023538:             const relevant = mutations.some(mutation => {
023539:                 if (mutation.target?.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId}`)) return false;
023540:                 if (mutationTouchesSelector(mutation, activitySelector)) return true;
023541:                 return false;
023542:             });
023543:             if (!relevant) return;
023544:             try { doc.querySelectorAll('iframe, frame').forEach(observeMissionRequirementsFrame); } catch (err) {}
023545:             scheduleMissionRequirementsScan(35);
023546:             missionRequirementsScheduleDocumentRecords(doc);
023547:         }));
023548:         observer.observe(root, { childList: true, subtree: true, characterData: true });
023549:     }
023550: 
023551:     function installMissionRequirementsWindows() {
023552:         if (!missionRequirementsPrimaryRuntime()) return;
023553:         if (!missionRequirementsFeatureInstalled) {
023554:             missionRequirementsFeatureInstalled = true;
023555:             runtimeOnCleanup(() => {
023556:                 runtimeClearTimeout(missionRequirementsScanTimer);
023557:                 missionRequirementsScanTimer = null;
023558:                 clearMissionRequirementsPanels();
023559:                 for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) {
023560:                     try { context.doc.getElementById?.(SCRIPT.missionRequirementsDocumentStyleId)?.remove(); } catch (err) {}
023561:                 }
023562:             });
023563:         }
023564:         for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) observeMissionRequirementsDocument(context.doc);
023565:         scheduleMissionRequirementsScan(0);
023566:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => scheduleMissionRequirementsScan(0), 180);
023567:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => scheduleMissionRequirementsScan(0), 800);
023568:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => scheduleMissionRequirementsScan(0), 1600);
023569:     }
023570: 
023571:     function criticalMissionValueForEntry(entry) {
023572:         return criticalMissionValueDetails(entry).value;
023573:     }
023574: 
023575:     function criticalValueEligible(entry) {
023576:         return selectedCriticalValueMode() === 'total' || Boolean(entry?.eligibleForCredits);
023577:     }
023578: 
023579:     function criticalValueGroup(entries, predicate = () => true) {
023580:         let total = 0;
023581:         let known = 0;
023582:         let unknown = 0;
023583:         let eligible = 0;
023584:         const seenMissionIds = new Set();
023585:         const sources = new Map();
023586:         for (const entry of entries) {
023587:             if (!predicate(entry) || !criticalValueEligible(entry)) continue;
023588:             const missionId = normaliseMissionId(entry?.missionId);
023589:             if (missionId !== null && seenMissionIds.has(missionId)) continue;
023590:             if (missionId !== null) seenMissionIds.add(missionId);
023591:             if (entry?.eligibleForCredits) eligible += 1;
023592:             const details = criticalMissionValueDetails(entry);
023593:             const value = details.value;
023594:             if (value === null || !Number.isFinite(Number(value))) {
023595:                 unknown += 1;
023596:                 continue;
023597:             }
023598:             total += Math.max(0, Number(value) || 0);
023599:             known += 1;
023600:             sources.set(details.source, (sources.get(details.source) || 0) + 1);
023601:         }
023602:         return { total: Math.round(total), known, unknown, eligible, count: seenMissionIds.size, sources };
023603:     }
023604: 
023605:     function criticalValueDisplay(group) {
023606:         if (!group?.known) return 'UNKNOWN';
023607:         return `≈${formatOperationalCompactCredits(group.total)} CR`;
023608:     }
023609: 
023610:     function criticalValueCoverage(group) {
023611:         return `${group.known.toLocaleString('en-GB')} / ${(group.known + group.unknown).toLocaleString('en-GB')} valued`;
023612:     }
023613: 
023614:     function criticalValueTitle(label, group) {
023615:         const knownText = `${group.known.toLocaleString('en-GB')} valued mission${group.known === 1 ? '' : 's'}`;
023616:         const unknownText = group.unknown ? ` · ${group.unknown.toLocaleString('en-GB')} value${group.unknown === 1 ? '' : 's'} unavailable` : '';
023617:         return `${label}: approximately ${group.total.toLocaleString('en-GB')} credits from MissionChief average-credit data · ${knownText}${unknownText}`;
023618:     }
023619: 
023620:     function criticalValuesHtml(allEntries, visibleEntries) {
023621:         const scopedEntries = visibleEntries;
023622:         const noScene = criticalValueGroup(scopedEntries, entry => Boolean(entry?.units?.known) && Math.max(0, Number(entry?.units?.onScene) || 0) === 0);
023623:         const assistance = criticalValueGroup(scopedEntries, entry => criticalEntryPrimaryStatus(entry) === 'assistance');
023624:         const visible = criticalValueGroup(scopedEntries);
023625:         const mode = selectedCriticalValueMode();
023626:         const showingText = `${mode === 'eligible' ? 'Eligible' : 'Total'} MissionChief average credits for ${visibleEntries.length.toLocaleString('en-GB')} currently visible mission${visibleEntries.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}`;
023627:         const valueCard = (className, label, group) => `<div class="mcms-critical-value-card ${className}" title="${escapeHtml(criticalValueTitle(label, group))}"><span>${escapeHtml(label)}</span><strong>${escapeHtml(criticalValueDisplay(group))}</strong><small>${escapeHtml(criticalValueCoverage(group))}</small></div>`;
023628:         return `
023629:             <div class="mcms-critical-values-label" title="${escapeHtml(showingText)}"><strong>MISSION</strong><span>VALUE</span></div>
023630:             <div class="mcms-critical-value-mode" role="group" aria-label="Mission value mode">
023631:                 <button type="button" data-critical-value-mode="total" class="${mode === 'total' ? 'mcms-filter-active' : ''}" aria-pressed="${mode === 'total'}">TOTAL</button>
023632:                 <button type="button" data-critical-value-mode="eligible" class="${mode === 'eligible' ? 'mcms-filter-active' : ''}" aria-pressed="${mode === 'eligible'}">ELIGIBLE</button>
023633:             </div>
023634:             <div class="mcms-critical-values-grid">
023635:                 ${valueCard('mcms-value-no-scene', 'No Scene', noScene)}
023636:                 ${valueCard('mcms-value-assistance', 'Assistance', assistance)}
023637:                 ${valueCard('mcms-value-all', 'Visible Value', visible)}
023638:             </div>
023639:             <span class="mcms-critical-showing">SHOWING ${visibleEntries.length.toLocaleString('en-GB')} OF ${allEntries.length.toLocaleString('en-GB')} MISSIONS</span>`;
023640:     }

030001:                 <div class="mcms-grid-2">
030002:                     <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="discord-test">Test Connection</button>
030003:                     <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="discord-clear">Clear Webhook</button>
030004:                 </div>

030006:                 <div class="mcms-status mcms-discord-status" data-discord-status data-tone="neutral">Select a reporting period, then generate and post the financial intelligence report.</div>

030008:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Player-Linked Local Financial Archive</div>
030009:                 <div class="mcms-row"><span class="mcms-row-label">Local historical archive</span><select class="mcms-select" data-setting="finance-vault-enabled"><option value="true">Enabled</option><option value="false">Disabled</option></select></div>
030010:                 <div class="mcms-row"><span class="mcms-row-label">History retention</span><select class="mcms-select" data-setting="finance-vault-retention"><option value="all">All available</option><option value="1825">5 years</option><option value="730">2 years</option><option value="365">1 year</option><option value="180">180 days</option><option value="90">90 days</option></select></div>
030011:                 <div class="mcms-row"><span class="mcms-row-label">GitHub intelligence feeds</span><select class="mcms-select" data-setting="finance-rule-feed"><option value="true">Automatic rules + policy</option><option value="false">Built-in intelligence only</option></select></div>
030012:                 <div class="mcms-grid-2">
030013:                     <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="finance-archive-scan">Deep Scan All Available</button>
030014:                     <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="finance-archive-cancel">Stop Scan</button>
030015:                     <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="finance-archive-export">Export Archive</button>
030016:                     <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="finance-archive-import">Import Archive</button>
030017:                 </div>
030018:                 <button class="mcms-small-btn" style="width:100% !important;margin-top:7px !important" type="button" data-action="finance-rules-refresh">Refresh Financial Intelligence</button>
030019:                 <button class="mcms-small-btn" style="width:100% !important;margin-top:7px !important" type="button" data-action="finance-archive-clear">Clear Player Archive</button>
030020:                 <input class="mcms-hidden-file" type="file" accept="application/json,text/json,.json" data-import-finance-file>
030021:                 <div class="mcms-finance-vault-summary" data-finance-vault-summary></div>
030022:                 <div class="mcms-status mcms-discord-status" data-finance-vault-status data-tone="neutral">Local Financial Archive ready.</div>
030023:                 <div class="mcms-status mcms-discord-status" data-finance-rule-status data-tone="neutral">Built-in financial intelligence active.</div>
030024:                 <div class="mcms-status">GitHub hosts public transaction-classification rules and audit policy only. The Toolkit never uploads player ledger data, Discord webhooks or repository credentials. The local archive is indexed by MissionChief player ID/name and can be transferred between devices using Export Archive / Import Archive or the complete private Toolkit backup.</div>
030025:                 <div class="mcms-status mcms-finance-private-note">Private backup warning: Export All includes your Discord webhook and locally stored MissionChief financial history. Anyone holding the file may post through the webhook and inspect the exported game ledger.</div>
030026:             </section>
030027:             <section class="mcms-tab-panel" data-panel="places">
030028:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Quick jumps + screen shortcuts</div>
030029:                 <div class="mcms-quick-list"></div>
030030:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Custom bookmarks + screen shortcuts</div>
030031:                 <div class="mcms-bookmark-list"></div>
030032:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Saved Map Profiles</div>
030033:                 <div class="mcms-profile-list" data-profile-list></div>
030034:                 <div class="mcms-status">Profiles store your map location, zoom, skin, visibility filters and operational overlays.</div>
030035:             </section>
030036:             <section class="mcms-tab-panel" data-panel="settings">
030037:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Device layout</div>
030038:                 <div class="mcms-row"><span class="mcms-row-label">Mobile Mode · iOS Safari</span><select class="mcms-select" data-setting="mobile-mode"><option value="auto">Auto detect iPhone</option><option value="on">Always on</option><option value="off">Always off</option></select></div>
030039:                 <div class="mcms-row"><span class="mcms-row-label">Tablet Mode</span><select class="mcms-select" data-setting="tablet-mode"><option value="auto">Auto detect</option><option value="on">Always on</option><option value="off">Always off</option></select></div>
030040:                 <div class="mcms-status" data-device-layout-status>Detecting device layout…</div>
030041:                 <div class="mcms-status">Mobile Mode is tuned for iPhone Safari with Tampermonkey: a map-aware 5×2 command grid in portrait, a compact single-row dock where space allows, full-width safe-area bottom sheets, 16px form controls to prevent Safari input zoom, and Visual Viewport handling for the iOS keyboard. Tablet and desktop layouts remain separate and unchanged.</div>
030042:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Dock position</div>
030043:                 <div class="mcms-position-grid">${positionButtons}</div>
030044:                 <div class="mcms-desktop-position-controls">
030045:                     <div class="mcms-section-label">Fine nudge</div>
030046:                     <div class="mcms-nudge-grid">
030047:                         <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="nudge-left">←</button>
030048:                         <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="nudge-up">↑</button>
030049:                         <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="nudge-down">↓</button>
