030050:                         <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="nudge-right">→</button>
030051:                         <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="nudge-reset">0</button>
030052:                     </div>
030053:                     <div class="mcms-status mcms-nudge-value">X 0 / Y 0</div>
030054:                     <div class="mcms-section-label">Menu panel</div>
030055:                     <div class="mcms-nudge-grid">
030056:                         <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="panel-left">←</button>
030057:                         <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="panel-up">↑</button>
030058:                         <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="panel-down">↓</button>
030059:                         <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="panel-right">→</button>
030060:                         <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="panel-reset">↺</button>
030061:                     </div>
030062:                 </div>
030063:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Input</div>
030064:                 <div class="mcms-grid-2">
030065:                     ${makeToggleButton('shortcuts', '⌨', 'Keys', 'Keyboard shortcuts on/off. Map tools: 1–9. Vehicle Codes: V. Mission Age Watch: W. Menu: M.')}
030066:                 </div>
030067:                 <div class="mcms-row"><span class="mcms-row-label">Major incident threshold</span><select class="mcms-select" data-setting="major-incident-minimum"><option value="10000">10,000+ credits</option><option value="25000">25,000+ credits</option><option value="50000">50,000+ credits</option><option value="100000">100,000+ credits</option></select></div>
030068:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Economy Mode</div>
030069:                 <div class="mcms-status mcms-economy-status">Use the leaf button beside the map-menu opener. Economy Mode preserves every module while reducing animations, map-layer pressure and background refresh frequency.</div>
030070:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Settings Backup</div>
030071:                 <div class="mcms-config-actions">
030072:                     <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="export-config" title="Export every toolkit setting, private integration, profile, bookmark and Financial Archive history" aria-label="Export all toolkit settings">Export All</button>
030073:                     <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="import-config" title="Import a current or legacy toolkit settings backup" aria-label="Import all toolkit settings">Import All</button>
030074:                     <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="reset-config">Reset</button>
030075:                 </div>
030076:                 <input class="mcms-hidden-file" type="file" accept="application/json,text/json,.json" data-import-config-file>
030077:                 <div class="mcms-status">Backups include every persistent toolkit preference, desktop/Tablet/iOS layout choice, profile, bookmark, saved Discord webhook and local Financial Archive history. A clear private-file warning is shown before export and import. Store the JSON securely. Current and legacy toolkit backup files are supported.</div>
030078:             </section>
030079:             <div class="mcms-footer">
030080:                 <span>Audited runtime: compact Smart Bookmark Labels, responsive modes and every interface theme remain fully preserved.</span>
030081:                 <span class="mcms-build">${SCRIPT.name} v${SCRIPT.version} · MIT · ${SCRIPT.author}</span>
030082:             </div>
030083:         `;
030084:         const tabList = panel.querySelector('.mcms-tabs');
030085:         if (tabList) tabList.setAttribute('role', 'tablist');
030086:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-tab-btn').forEach(button => {
030087:             const tab = button.dataset.tab;
030088:             button.id = `mcms-tab-${tab}`;
030089:             button.setAttribute('role', 'tab');
030090:             button.setAttribute('aria-controls', `mcms-tabpanel-${tab}`);
030091:             button.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'false');
030092:             button.tabIndex = -1;
030093:         });
030094:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-tab-panel').forEach(tabPanel => {
030095:             const tab = tabPanel.dataset.panel;
030096:             tabPanel.id = `mcms-tabpanel-${tab}`;
030097:             tabPanel.setAttribute('role', 'tabpanel');
030098:             tabPanel.setAttribute('aria-labelledby', `mcms-tab-${tab}`);
030099:             tabPanel.hidden = true;
030100:         });
030101:         panel.addEventListener('keydown', event => {
030102:             const current = closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-tab-btn');
030103:             if (!current || !['ArrowLeft', 'ArrowRight', 'Home', 'End'].includes(event.key)) return;
030104:             const buttons = Array.from(panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-tab-btn'));
030105:             const currentIndex = Math.max(0, buttons.indexOf(current));
030106:             const nextIndex = event.key === 'Home' ? 0
030107:                 : event.key === 'End' ? buttons.length - 1
030108:                 : (currentIndex + (event.key === 'ArrowRight' ? 1 : -1) + buttons.length) % buttons.length;
030109:             event.preventDefault();
030110:             const nextButton = buttons[nextIndex];
030111:             setActiveTab(nextButton.dataset.tab);
030112:             nextButton.focus({ preventScroll: true });
030113:         });
030114:         panel.addEventListener('click', event => {
030115:             const closeButton = closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-close');
030116:             const tabButton = closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-tab-btn');
030117:             const uiThemeButton = closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-ui-theme-btn');
030118:             const themeButton = closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-theme-btn');
030119:             const toggleButton = closestEventTarget(event, '[data-toggle]');
030120:             const positionButton = closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-position-btn');
030121:             const actionButton = closestEventTarget(event, '[data-action]');
030122:             if (closeButton) { closePanel({ restoreFocus: true }); return; }
030123:             if (tabButton) { setActiveTab(tabButton.dataset.tab); return; }
030124:             if (uiThemeButton) { applyUiTheme(uiThemeButton.dataset.uiTheme, true); return; }
030125:             if (themeButton) { applyTheme(themeButton.dataset.theme, true); return; }
030126:             if (toggleButton) { toggleFeature(toggleButton.dataset.toggle); return; }
030127:             if (positionButton) { applyPosition(positionButton.dataset.position, true); return; }
030128:             if (actionButton) {
030129:                 event.preventDefault();
030130:                 handleAction(actionButton);
030131:                 return;
030132:             }
030133:         });
030134:         panel.addEventListener('change', event => handleSettingChange(event.target));
030135:         const dragHandle = panel.querySelector('.mcms-drag-handle');
030136:         if (dragHandle) {
030137:             dragHandle.addEventListener('mousedown', startPanelDrag, true);
030138:             dragHandle.addEventListener('touchstart', startPanelDrag, { capture: true, passive: false });
030139:         }
030140:         ['click', 'dblclick', 'mousedown', 'mouseup', 'mousemove', 'wheel', 'contextmenu', 'touchstart', 'touchmove', 'touchend'].forEach(eventName => {
030141:             panel.addEventListener(eventName, event => event.stopPropagation(), { passive: false });
030142:         });
030143:         document.body.appendChild(panel);
030144:         const importInput = panel.querySelector('[data-import-config-file]');
030145:         if (importInput) {
030146:             importInput.addEventListener('change', () => {
030147:                 const file = importInput.files?.[0];
030148:                 if (file) importToolkitConfigFile(file);
030149:                 importInput.value = '';
030150:             });
030151:         }
030152:         const financeImportInput = panel.querySelector('[data-import-finance-file]');
030153:         if (financeImportInput) {
030154:             financeImportInput.addEventListener('change', () => {
030155:                 const file = financeImportInput.files?.[0];
030156:                 if (file) importFinancialArchiveFile(file);
030157:                 financeImportInput.value = '';
030158:             });
030159:         }
030160:         renderQuickPlaces();
030161:         renderBookmarks();
030162:         renderProfiles();
030163:         updateUI();
030164:         recordStartupMetric('settingsPanelBuildMs', panelStartedAt, { settingsPanelLazy: true });
030165:         return panel;
030166:     }
030167: 
030168:     function renderQuickPlaces() {
030169:         const list = document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-quick-list`);
030170:         if (!list) return;
030171:         list.innerHTML = QUICK_PLACES.map(place => `
030172:             <div class="mcms-quick-row">
030173:                 <button class="mcms-place-main" type="button" data-action="place-go" data-place="${place.id}" title="Jump to ${escapeHtml(place.name)}">
030174:                     <span class="mcms-iconbox">⌖</span><span class="mcms-text"><span class="mcms-label">${escapeHtml(place.name)}</span><span class="mcms-pill">${place.label}</span></span>
030175:                 </button>
030176:                 <button class="mcms-pin-btn ${state.quickPins[place.id] ? 'mcms-on' : ''}" type="button" data-action="quick-pin" data-place="${place.id}" title="Pin as persistent screen shortcut">${state.quickPins[place.id] ? 'ON' : 'PIN'}</button>
030177:             </div>
030178:         `).join('');
030179:     }
030180: 
030181:     function renderBookmarks() {
030182:         const list = document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-bookmark-list`);
030183:         if (!list) return;
030184:         list.innerHTML = state.bookmarks.map((bookmark, index) => {
030185:             if (!bookmark) {
030186:                 return `<div class="mcms-bookmark-row"><span class="mcms-bookmark-name">Slot ${index + 1} empty</span><span></span><span></span><button class="mcms-bookmark-btn" type="button" data-action="bookmark-save" data-slot="${index}">Save</button><span></span></div>`;
030187:             }
030188:             const screenLabel = bookmarkScreenLabel(bookmark);
030189:             const labelMode = bookmark.shortLabel ? 'CUSTOM' : 'AUTO';
030190:             const labelTitle = `${bookmark.name} · Screen label: ${screenLabel} (${labelMode.toLowerCase()})`;
030191:             return `
030192:                 <div class="mcms-bookmark-row">
030193:                     <button class="mcms-bookmark-name mcms-bookmark-name-btn" type="button" data-action="bookmark-label" data-slot="${index}" title="${escapeHtml(labelTitle)}" aria-label="Edit ${escapeHtml(bookmark.name)} name and short label">
030194:                         <span class="mcms-bookmark-name-main">${escapeHtml(bookmark.name)}</span>
030195:                         <span class="mcms-bookmark-short">${escapeHtml(screenLabel)} · ${labelMode}</span>
030196:                     </button>
030197:                     <button class="mcms-bookmark-btn" type="button" data-action="bookmark-go" data-slot="${index}">Go</button>
030198:                     <button class="mcms-pin-btn ${bookmark.pinned ? 'mcms-on' : ''}" type="button" data-action="bookmark-pin" data-slot="${index}" title="Pin as persistent screen shortcut">${bookmark.pinned ? 'ON' : 'PIN'}</button>
030199:                     <button class="mcms-bookmark-btn" type="button" data-action="bookmark-save" data-slot="${index}" title="Update this bookmark from the current map view">Save</button>
030200:                     <button class="mcms-bookmark-btn" type="button" data-action="bookmark-delete" data-slot="${index}">×</button>
030201:                 </div>`;
030202:         }).join('');
030203:     }
030204: 
030205:     function renderScreenPins() {
030206:         const dock = document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-screen-pins`);
030207:         if (!dock) return;
030208:         const entries = [];
030209:         for (const place of QUICK_PLACES) {
030210:             if (!state.quickPins[place.id]) continue;
030211:             entries.push({
030212:                 kind: 'quick',
030213:                 id: place.id,
030214:                 fullName: place.name,
030215:                 baseLabel: sanitiseBookmarkShortLabel(place.label) || makeSmartBookmarkLabel(place.name)
030216:             });
030217:         }
030218:         state.bookmarks.forEach((bookmark, index) => {
030219:             if (!bookmark || !bookmark.pinned) return;
030220:             entries.push({
030221:                 kind: 'bookmark',
030222:                 index,
030223:                 fullName: bookmark.name,
030224:                 baseLabel: bookmarkScreenLabel(bookmark)
030225:             });
030226:         });
030227:         dock.innerHTML = resolveScreenPinLabels(entries).map(entry => {
030228:             const action = entry.kind === 'quick'
030229:                 ? `data-action="place-go" data-place="${escapeHtml(entry.id)}"`
030230:                 : `data-action="bookmark-go" data-slot="${entry.index}"`;
030231:             const className = entry.kind === 'quick' ? 'mcms-pin-quick' : 'mcms-pin-custom';
030232:             return `<button class="mcms-screen-pin-btn ${className}" type="button" ${action} data-full-label="${escapeHtml(entry.fullName)}" data-smart-label="${escapeHtml(entry.label)}" title="Jump to ${escapeHtml(entry.fullName)}" aria-label="Jump to ${escapeHtml(entry.fullName)}">${escapeHtml(entry.label)}</button>`;
030233:         }).join('');
030234:         if (isTouchLayoutActive()) fitControlToMap();
030235:     }
030236: 
030237:     function handleAction(button) {
030238:         const action = button.dataset.action;
030239:         if (action === 'place-go') {
030240:             const place = QUICK_PLACES.find(item => item.id === button.dataset.place);
030241:             if (place && setMapView(place.lat, place.lng, place.zoom)) showToast(place.name);
030242:             return;
030243:         }
030244:         if (action === 'quick-pin') { toggleQuickPin(button.dataset.place); return; }
030245:         if (action === 'bookmark-save') { saveBookmark(Number(button.dataset.slot)); return; }
030246:         if (action === 'bookmark-label') { editBookmarkLabel(Number(button.dataset.slot)); return; }
030247:         if (action === 'bookmark-go') { goBookmark(Number(button.dataset.slot)); return; }
030248:         if (action === 'bookmark-delete') { deleteBookmark(Number(button.dataset.slot)); return; }
030249:         if (action === 'bookmark-pin') { toggleBookmarkPin(Number(button.dataset.slot)); return; }
030250:         if (action === 'nudge-left') { nudgeControl(-4, 0); return; }
030251:         if (action === 'nudge-right') { nudgeControl(4, 0); return; }
030252:         if (action === 'nudge-up') { nudgeControl(0, -4); return; }
030253:         if (action === 'nudge-down') { nudgeControl(0, 4); return; }
030254:         if (action === 'nudge-reset') { resetNudge(); return; }
030255:         if (action === 'panel-left') { nudgePanel(-24, 0); return; }
030256:         if (action === 'panel-right') { nudgePanel(24, 0); return; }
030257:         if (action === 'panel-up') { nudgePanel(0, -24); return; }
030258:         if (action === 'panel-down') { nudgePanel(0, 24); return; }
030259:         if (action === 'open-help-center') { openHelpCenter(); return; }
030260:         if (action === 'toggle-economy') { setEconomyMode(!state.economyMode, true); return; }
030261:         if (action === 'open-critical-drawer') { toggleCriticalDrawer(); return; }
030262:         if (action === 'open-vehicle-status') { toggleVehicleCodeStatus(); return; }
030263:         if (action === 'fit-critical') { fitCriticalMissions(); return; }
030264:         if (action === 'scan-transport-sweep') { const queue = buildTransportSweepQueue(); showToast(queue.length ? `${queue.length} transport mission${queue.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} found` : 'No alliance patient transports found'); return; }
030265:         if (action === 'start-transport-sweep') { startTransportSweep(); return; }
030266:         if (action === 'stop-transport-sweep') { stopTransportSweep(); return; }
030267:         if (action === 'reset-session') { resetSessionPerformance(); return; }
030268:         if (action === 'clear-payout-history') { clearPayoutHistory(); return; }
030269:         if (action === 'critical-go') { focusMissionById(button.dataset.missionId, false); return; }
030270:         if (action === 'profile-save') { saveMapProfile(Number(button.dataset.slot)); return; }
030271:         if (action === 'profile-load') { loadMapProfile(Number(button.dataset.slot)); return; }
030272:         if (action === 'profile-delete') { deleteMapProfile(Number(button.dataset.slot)); return; }
030273:         if (action === 'export-config') { exportToolkitConfig(); return; }
030274:         if (action === 'import-config') { document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} [data-import-config-file]`)?.click?.(); return; }
030275:         if (action === 'reset-config') { resetToolkitConfiguration(); return; }
030276:         if (action === 'discord-test') { testDiscordWebhook(); return; }
030277:         if (action === 'discord-generate-post') { postDiscordFinancialReport(); return; }
030278:         if (action === 'discord-clear') { clearDiscordWebhook(); return; }
030279:         if (action === 'finance-archive-scan') { scanFinancialArchive(); return; }
030280:         if (action === 'finance-archive-cancel') { cancelFinancialArchiveScan(); return; }
030281:         if (action === 'finance-archive-export') { exportFinancialArchive(); return; }
030282:         if (action === 'finance-archive-import') { document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} [data-import-finance-file]`)?.click?.(); return; }
030283:         if (action === 'finance-archive-clear') { clearFinancialArchive(); return; }
030284:         if (action === 'finance-rules-refresh') { refreshFinancialIntelligenceFeeds(true).then(() => { renderFinanceVaultStatus(); showToast('GitHub financial intelligence refreshed'); }); return; }
030285:         if (action === 'test-payout-flash') {
030286:             const testAmount = Math.max(1000, Number(document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} [data-setting="payout-test-amount"]`)?.value) || state.payoutFlash.threshold);
030287:             const triggered = triggerPayoutFlash(testAmount, true, { source: 'personal', caption: 'Emergency Response Test' });
030288:             showToast(triggered ? 'Emergency flash test' : 'Emergency flash unavailable: map not detected');
030289:             return;
030290:         }
030291:         if (action === 'panel-reset') resetPanelPosition();
030292:     }
030293: 
030294:     function handleSettingChange(target) {
030295:         const setting = target.dataset.setting;
030296:         if (!setting) return;
030297:         if (setting === 'mobile-mode' || setting === 'tablet-mode') {
030298:             const nextValue = ['auto', 'on', 'off'].includes(String(target.value)) ? String(target.value) : 'auto';
030299:             const previousLayout = activeDeviceLayout;
030300:             if (setting === 'mobile-mode') {
030301:                 state.mobileMode = nextValue;
030302:                 if (nextValue === 'on') state.tabletMode = 'off';
030303:             } else {
030304:                 state.tabletMode = nextValue;
030305:                 if (nextValue === 'on') state.mobileMode = 'off';
030306:             }
030307:             saveState();
030308:             applyRootAttributes();
030309:             refreshTabletModeUi();
030310:             if (previousLayout !== activeDeviceLayout && !isTouchLayoutActive()) {
030311:                 clearTabletPanelSizing();
030312:                 clearTabletDockSizing();
030313:             }
030314:             fitControlToMap();
030315:             positionPanelOverlay(true);
030316:             showToast(activeDeviceLayout === 'mobile' ? 'iOS Mobile Mode active' : activeDeviceLayout === 'tablet' ? 'Tablet Mode active' : 'Desktop layout active');
030317:             return;
030318:         }
030319:         if (setting === 'major-incident-minimum') {
030320:             state.majorIncidentFeed.minimumCredits = MAJOR_INCIDENT_FEED_MINIMUM_OPTIONS.includes(Number(target.value)) ? Number(target.value) : 25000;
030321:             saveState();
030322:             updateUI();
030323:             refreshMissionSnapshots();
030324:             scheduleMajorIncidentFeedRender(0);
030325:             showToast(`Major Incident Feed: ${formatOperationalCompactCredits(state.majorIncidentFeed.minimumCredits)}+ credits`);
030326:             return;
030327:         }
030328:         if (setting === 'coverage-radius') {
030329:             state.coverage.radiusMi = Number(target.value) || 10;
030330:             saveState();
030331:             updateUI();
030332:             scheduleCoverageRefresh();
030333:             return;
030334:         }
030335:         if (setting === 'heatmap-source') state.heatmap.source = target.value === 'vehicles' ? 'vehicles' : 'stations';
030336:         if (setting === 'heatmap-service') state.heatmap.service = ['all', 'fire', 'ambulance', 'police', 'air', 'water'].includes(target.value) ? target.value : 'all';
030337:         if (setting === 'heatmap-radius') state.heatmap.radiusMi = Number(target.value) || 10;
030338:         if (setting === 'heatmap-opacity') state.heatmap.opacity = clamp(target.value, 0.12, 0.55, 0.30);
030339:         if (setting.startsWith('heatmap-')) {
030340:             saveState(); updateUI(); scheduleHeatmapRefresh(); return;
030341:         }
030342:         if (setting === 'transport-sweep-delay') {
030343:             state.transportSweep.delayMs = TRANSPORT_SWEEP_DELAY_OPTIONS.includes(Number(target.value)) ? Number(target.value) : 2000;
030344:             saveState(); updateUI();
030345:             showToast(`Transport Sweep delay: ${state.transportSweep.delayMs / 1000}s`);
030346:             return;
030347:         }
030348:         if (setting === 'transport-sweep-max') {
030349:             state.transportSweep.maxPerRun = Math.round(clamp(target.value, 1, TRANSPORT_SWEEP_MAX_REQUESTS, 25));
030350:             saveState(); updateUI();
030351:             showToast(`Transport Sweep maximum: ${state.transportSweep.maxPerRun}`);
030352:             return;
030353:         }
030354:         if (setting === 'resource-gap-radius') {
030355:             state.resourceGap.radiusMi = RESOURCE_GAP_RADIUS_OPTIONS.includes(Number(target.value)) ? Number(target.value) : 25;
030356:             resourceGapAnalysisCache.clear();
030357:             saveState(); updateUI(); scheduleResourceGapRefresh(0); refreshVisibleMissionInspector();
030358:             showToast(`Resource Gap radius: ${state.resourceGap.radiusMi}mi`);
030359:             return;
030360:         }
030361:         if (setting === 'stuck-threshold') {
030362:             state.stuckDetector.thresholdMin = Math.round(clamp(target.value, STUCK_MIN_MINUTES, STUCK_MAX_MINUTES, 20));
030363:             saveState();
030364:             updateUI();
030365:             scheduleStuckMissionRefresh(0);
030366:             showToast(`Stuck missions: ${state.stuckDetector.thresholdMin} minutes`);
030367:             return;
030368:         }
030369:         if (setting === 'alliance-credit-minimum') {
030370:             state.allianceCreditMinimum = [0, 5000, 10000, 15000, 20000].includes(Number(target.value)) ? Number(target.value) : 0;
030371:             saveState();
030372:             updateUI();
030373:             scheduleAllianceCreditRefresh(0);
030374:             showToast(state.allianceCreditMinimum ? `Alliance credits: ${state.allianceCreditMinimum / 1000}K+` : 'Alliance credits: all values');
030375:             return;
030376:         }
030377:         if (setting === 'discord-webhook') {
030378:             try {
030379:                 saveDiscordWebhookUrl(target.value);
030380:                 setDiscordStatus(target.value ? 'Webhook saved securely in Tampermonkey storage.' : 'Webhook removed.', 'good');
030381:             } catch (err) {
030382:                 setDiscordStatus(err?.message || 'Webhook URL is invalid.', 'bad');
030383:             }
030384:             return;
030385:         }
030386:         if (setting === 'discord-name') {
030387:             state.discordReport.webhookName = String(target.value || 'MissionChief Finance').trim().slice(0, 80) || 'MissionChief Finance';
030388:             saveState(); updateUI();
030389:             return;
030390:         }
030391:         if (setting === 'discord-top-categories') {
030392:             state.discordReport.topCategories = [3, 5, 8].includes(Number(target.value)) ? Number(target.value) : 5;
030393:             invalidateDiscordFinancialPreview();
030394:             saveState(); updateUI();
030395:             return;
030396:         }
030397:         if (setting === 'discord-period') {
030398:             state.discordReport.period = ['today', 'yesterday', 'last24', 'last7', 'last30', 'last90', 'last180', 'last365', 'allAvailable', 'session', 'sinceLast', 'custom'].includes(target.value) ? target.value : 'today';
030399:             invalidateDiscordFinancialPreview();
030400:             saveState(); updateUI();
030401:             return;
030402:         }
030403:         if (setting === 'discord-custom-start' || setting === 'discord-custom-end') {
030404:             const key = setting === 'discord-custom-start' ? 'customStart' : 'customEnd';
030405:             if (/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/u.test(String(target.value || ''))) state.discordReport[key] = String(target.value);
030406:             invalidateDiscordFinancialPreview();
030407:             saveState(); updateUI();
030408:             return;
030409:         }
030410:         if (setting === 'discord-comparison') {
030411:             state.discordReport.includeComparison = String(target.value) !== 'false';
030412:             invalidateDiscordFinancialPreview();
030413:             saveState(); updateUI();
030414:             return;
030415:         }
030416:         if (setting === 'discord-chart') {
030417:             state.discordReport.includeChart = String(target.value) !== 'false';
030418:             invalidateDiscordFinancialPreview();
030419:             saveState(); updateUI();
030420:             return;
030421:         }
030422:         if (setting === 'discord-report-mode') {
030423:             state.discordReport.reportMode = ['executive', 'fullAudit'].includes(String(target.value)) ? String(target.value) : 'fullAudit';
030424:             invalidateDiscordFinancialPreview();
030425:             saveState(); updateUI();
030426:             return;
030427:         }
030428:         if (setting === 'discord-risk' || setting === 'discord-forecast') {
030429:             const key = setting === 'discord-risk' ? 'includeRisk' : 'includeForecast';
030430:             state.discordReport[key] = String(target.value) !== 'false';
030431:             invalidateDiscordFinancialPreview();
030432:             saveState(); updateUI();
030433:             return;
030434:         }
030435:         if (setting === 'finance-vault-enabled') {
030436:             state.financialVault.enabled = String(target.value) !== 'false';
030437:             saveState(); updateUI();
030438:             setFinanceVaultStatus(state.financialVault.enabled ? 'Local Financial Archive enabled.' : 'Local Financial Archive disabled; reports will scan MissionChief directly without retaining history.', 'neutral');
030439:             return;
030440:         }
030441:         if (setting === 'finance-vault-retention') {
030442:             state.financialVault.retentionDays = String(target.value) === 'all' ? 'all' : ([90, 180, 365, 730, 1825].includes(Number(target.value)) ? Number(target.value) : 'all');
030443:             saveState(); updateUI(); renderFinanceVaultStatus();
030444:             return;
030445:         }
030446:         if (setting === 'finance-rule-feed') {
030447:             state.financialVault.ruleFeedEnabled = String(target.value) !== 'false';
030448:             saveState();
030449:             refreshFinancialIntelligenceFeeds(true).then(() => { updateUI(); renderFinanceVaultStatus(); });
030450:             return;
030451:         }
030452:         if (setting === 'payout-template') {
030453:             state.payoutFlash.template = PAYOUT_TEMPLATES[target.value] ? target.value : 'gta5';
030454:             disposePayoutMediaAudio();
030455:             saveState();
030456:             updateUI();
030457:             const hostedCue = PAYOUT_MEDIA_SOUNDS[state.payoutFlash.template];
030458:             showToast(hostedCue
030459:                 ? `${payoutTemplateMeta(state.payoutFlash.template).label} · ${hostedCue.label} ready`
030460:                 : `${payoutTemplateMeta(state.payoutFlash.template).label} payout template`);
030461:             return;
030462:         }
030463:         if (setting === 'payout-threshold') {
030464:             state.payoutFlash.threshold = Math.round(clamp(target.value, 1000, 1000000000, 10000));
030465:             saveState();
030466:             updateUI();
030467:             showToast(`Payout flash: ${state.payoutFlash.threshold.toLocaleString()}+`);
030468:             return;
030469:         }
030470:         if (setting === 'payout-duration') {
030471:             state.payoutFlash.durationMs = normalisePayoutFlashDuration(Number(target.value) * 1000);
030472:             saveState();
030473:             updateUI();
030474:             showToast(`Payout flash: ${state.payoutFlash.durationMs / 1000} seconds`);
030475:             return;
030476:         }
030477:         if (setting === 'payout-volume') {
030478:             state.payoutFlash.soundVolume = clamp(target.value, 0, 1, 0.35);
030479:             if (payoutMediaAudio && !payoutMediaAudio.paused) payoutMediaAudio.volume = state.payoutFlash.soundVolume;
030480:             saveState();
030481:             updateUI();
030482:             return;
030483:         }
030484:         if (setting === 'payout-test-amount') return;
030485:         if (setting === 'auto-night-start') state.autoNight.nightStart = target.value || '19:00';
030486:         if (setting === 'auto-day-start') state.autoNight.dayStart = target.value || '07:00';
030487:         if (setting === 'auto-night-theme') state.autoNight.nightTheme = normaliseTheme(target.value);
030488:         if (setting === 'auto-day-theme') state.autoNight.dayTheme = normaliseTheme(target.value);
030489:         if (setting.startsWith('auto-')) {
030490:             state.autoNight.lastBucket = '';
030491:             saveState();
030492:             runAutoNight(true);
030493:             updateUI();
030494:         }
030495:     }
030496: 
030497:     function updateUI() {
030498:         applyRootAttributes();
030499:         if (state.missionRequirements) scheduleMissionRequirementsScan(0);
030500:         if (state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled && operationalStartupComplete) scheduleMajorIncidentFeedRender(40);
030501:         else if (!state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled) removeMajorIncidentFeed();
030502:         const control = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId);
030503:         const panel = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId);
030504:         if (control) {
030505:             for (const pos of Object.keys(POSITIONS)) control.classList.toggle(`mcms-pos-${pos}`, state.position === pos);
030506:             control.style.setProperty('--mcms-nudge-x', `${state.nudge.x}px`);
030507:             control.style.setProperty('--mcms-nudge-y', `${state.nudge.y}px`);
030508:             const controlToggleValues = {
030509:                 allianceMissions: state.visibility.allianceMissions,
030510:                 myMissions: state.visibility.myMissions,
030511:                 vehicles: state.visibility.vehicles,
030512:                 buildings: state.visibility.buildings,
030513:                 allianceCredits: state.allianceCredits,
030514:                 missionAge: state.missionAge,
030515:                 transportWatcher: state.transportWatcher,
030516:                 unitCommitment: state.unitCommitment,
030517:                 criticalView: criticalViewActive
030518:             };
030519:             control.querySelectorAll('[data-toggle]').forEach(btn => {
030520:                 const on = Boolean(controlToggleValues[btn.dataset.toggle]);
030521:                 btn.classList.toggle('mcms-on', on);
030522:                 btn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', String(on));
030523:                 btn.dataset.mcmsState = on ? 'on' : 'off';
030524:             });
030525:             const vehicleStatusButton = control.querySelector('[data-action="open-vehicle-status"]');
030526:             if (vehicleStatusButton) {
030527:                 const open = Boolean(document.getElementById(SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId)?.classList?.contains('mcms-open'));
030528:                 vehicleStatusButton.classList.toggle('mcms-on', open);
030529:                 vehicleStatusButton.setAttribute('aria-pressed', String(open));
030530:                 vehicleStatusButton.dataset.mcmsState = open ? 'on' : 'off';
030531:             }
030532:             const missionAgeWatchButton = control.querySelector('[data-action="open-critical-drawer"]');
030533:             if (missionAgeWatchButton) {
030534:                 const open = Boolean(document.getElementById(SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId)?.classList?.contains('mcms-open'));
030535:                 missionAgeWatchButton.classList.toggle('mcms-on', open);
030536:                 missionAgeWatchButton.setAttribute('aria-pressed', String(open));
030537:                 missionAgeWatchButton.dataset.mcmsState = open ? 'on' : 'off';
030538:             }
030539:             const economyButton = control.querySelector('.mcms-economy-btn');
030540:             if (economyButton) {
030541:                 const on = Boolean(state.economyMode);
030542:                 const label = on ? 'Disable Economy Mode' : 'Enable Economy Mode';
030543:                 economyButton.classList.toggle('mcms-on', on);
030544:                 economyButton.setAttribute('aria-pressed', String(on));
030545:                 economyButton.setAttribute('aria-label', label);
030546:                 economyButton.title = label;
030547:                 economyButton.dataset.mcmsState = on ? 'on' : 'off';
030548:             }
030549:             const dockToggleButton = control.querySelector('.mcms-dock-toggle-btn');
030550:             if (dockToggleButton) {
030551:                 const open = state.commandBarOpen !== false;
030552:                 const label = open ? 'Collapse command bar' : 'Expand command bar';
030553:                 dockToggleButton.classList.toggle('mcms-open', open);
030554:                 dockToggleButton.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(open));
030555:                 dockToggleButton.setAttribute('aria-label', label);
030556:                 dockToggleButton.title = label;
030557:                 const icon = dockToggleButton.querySelector('.mcms-dock-toggle-icon');
030558:                 if (icon) icon.textContent = open ? '▴' : '▾';
030559:             }
030560:         }
030561:         if (!panel) return;
030562:         refreshTabletModeUi(panel);
030563:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-tab-btn').forEach(btn => {
030564:             const active = btn.dataset.tab === state.activeTab;
030565:             btn.classList.toggle('mcms-active', active);
030566:             btn.setAttribute('aria-selected', String(active));
030567:             btn.tabIndex = active ? 0 : -1;
030568:         });
030569:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-tab-panel').forEach(tabPanel => {
030570:             const active = tabPanel.dataset.panel === state.activeTab;
030571:             tabPanel.classList.toggle('mcms-active', active);
030572:             tabPanel.hidden = !active;
030573:         });
030574:         const panelOpen = panel.classList.contains('mcms-open');
030575:         panel.setAttribute('aria-hidden', String(!panelOpen));
030576:         control?.querySelector('.mcms-menu-btn')?.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(panelOpen));
030577:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-ui-theme-btn').forEach(btn => {
030578:             const active = btn.dataset.uiTheme === state.uiTheme;
030579:             btn.classList.toggle('mcms-active', active);
030580:             btn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', String(active));
030581:         });
030582:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-theme-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.toggle('mcms-active', btn.dataset.theme === state.theme));
030583:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-position-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.toggle('mcms-active', btn.dataset.position === state.position));
030584:         const toggleValues = {
030585:             clean: state.cleanMode,
030586:             markerFocus: state.markerFocus,
030587:             missionPulse: state.missionPulse,
030588:             roadPriority: state.roadPriority,
030589:             coverage: state.coverage.enabled,
030590:             heatmap: state.heatmap.enabled,
030591:             shortcuts: state.shortcuts,
030592:             autoLoadAllVehicles: state.autoLoadAllVehicles,
030593:             allianceBuildingsMapBlocker: state.allianceBuildingsMap === false,
030594:             majorIncidentFeed: state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled,
030595:             missionLockAudio: state.missionLockAudio,
030596:             autoNight: state.autoNight.enabled,
030597:             payoutFlash: state.payoutFlash.enabled,
030598:             payoutSound: state.payoutFlash.soundEnabled,
030599:             missionInspector: state.missionInspector,
030600:             missionValue: state.missionValue,
030601:             missionRequirements: state.missionRequirements,
030602:             stuckDetector: state.stuckDetector.enabled,
030603:             missionSpawn: state.missionSpawn.enabled,
030604:             resourceGap: state.resourceGap.enabled,
030605:             allianceMissions: state.visibility.allianceMissions,
030606:             myMissions: state.visibility.myMissions,
030607:             vehicles: state.visibility.vehicles,
030608:             buildings: state.visibility.buildings,
030609:             allianceCredits: state.allianceCredits,
030610:             missionAge: state.missionAge,
030611:             transportWatcher: state.transportWatcher,
030612:             unitCommitment: state.unitCommitment,
030613:             criticalView: criticalViewActive
030614:         };
030615:         panel.querySelectorAll('[data-toggle]').forEach(btn => {
030616:             const key = btn.dataset.toggle;
030617:             const on = Boolean(toggleValues[key]);
030618:             btn.classList.toggle('mcms-on', on);
030619:             const pill = btn.querySelector('.mcms-pill');
030620:             if (pill) pill.textContent = key === 'coverage' ? (on ? `${state.coverage.radiusMi}mi` : 'OFF') : key === 'heatmap' ? (on ? `${state.heatmap.radiusMi}mi` : 'OFF') : (on ? 'ON' : 'OFF');
030621:         });
030622:         const majorIncidentMinimum = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="major-incident-minimum"]');
030623:         if (majorIncidentMinimum) majorIncidentMinimum.value = String(state.majorIncidentFeed.minimumCredits);
030624:         const radius = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="coverage-radius"]');
030625:         if (radius) radius.value = String(state.coverage.radiusMi);
030626:         const heatmapSource = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="heatmap-source"]');
030627:         if (heatmapSource) heatmapSource.value = state.heatmap.source;
030628:         const heatmapService = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="heatmap-service"]');
030629:         if (heatmapService) heatmapService.value = state.heatmap.service;
030630:         const heatmapRadius = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="heatmap-radius"]');
030631:         if (heatmapRadius) heatmapRadius.value = String(state.heatmap.radiusMi);
030632:         const heatmapOpacity = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="heatmap-opacity"]');
030633:         if (heatmapOpacity) heatmapOpacity.value = String(state.heatmap.opacity);
030634:         const allianceCreditMinimum = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="alliance-credit-minimum"]');
030635:         if (allianceCreditMinimum) allianceCreditMinimum.value = String(state.allianceCreditMinimum);
030636:         const transportSweepDelay = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="transport-sweep-delay"]');
030637:         if (transportSweepDelay) transportSweepDelay.value = String(state.transportSweep.delayMs);
030638:         const transportSweepMax = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="transport-sweep-max"]');
030639:         if (transportSweepMax) transportSweepMax.value = String(state.transportSweep.maxPerRun);
030640:         if (panel.classList.contains('mcms-open') && state.activeTab === 'resources') renderTransportSweepPanel();
030641:         const payoutTemplate = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="payout-template"]');
030642:         if (payoutTemplate) payoutTemplate.value = state.payoutFlash.template;
030643:         const resourceGapRadius = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="resource-gap-radius"]'); if (resourceGapRadius) resourceGapRadius.value = String(state.resourceGap.radiusMi);
030644:         const stuckThreshold = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="stuck-threshold"]');
030645:         if (stuckThreshold) stuckThreshold.value = String(state.stuckDetector.thresholdMin);
030646:         const payoutThreshold = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="payout-threshold"]');
030647:         if (payoutThreshold) payoutThreshold.value = String(state.payoutFlash.threshold);
030648:         const payoutDuration = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="payout-duration"]');
030649:         if (payoutDuration) payoutDuration.value = String(state.payoutFlash.durationMs / 1000);
030650:         const payoutVolume = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="payout-volume"]');
030651:         if (payoutVolume) payoutVolume.value = String(state.payoutFlash.soundVolume);
030652:         const discordWebhook = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-webhook"]');
030653:         if (discordWebhook && document.activeElement !== discordWebhook) discordWebhook.value = getDiscordWebhookUrl();
030654:         const discordName = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-name"]');
030655:         if (discordName && document.activeElement !== discordName) discordName.value = state.discordReport.webhookName;
030656:         const discordTopCategories = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-top-categories"]');
030657:         if (discordTopCategories) discordTopCategories.value = String(state.discordReport.topCategories);
030658:         const discordPeriod = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-period"]');
030659:         if (discordPeriod) discordPeriod.value = state.discordReport.period;
030660:         const discordCustomStart = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-custom-start"]');
030661:         if (discordCustomStart && document.activeElement !== discordCustomStart) discordCustomStart.value = state.discordReport.customStart;
030662:         const discordCustomEnd = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-custom-end"]');
030663:         if (discordCustomEnd && document.activeElement !== discordCustomEnd) discordCustomEnd.value = state.discordReport.customEnd;
030664:         const discordComparison = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-comparison"]');
030665:         if (discordComparison) discordComparison.value = String(state.discordReport.includeComparison);
030666:         const discordChart = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-chart"]');
030667:         if (discordChart) discordChart.value = String(state.discordReport.includeChart);
030668:         const discordReportMode = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-report-mode"]');
030669:         if (discordReportMode) discordReportMode.value = state.discordReport.reportMode;
030670:         const discordRisk = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-risk"]');
030671:         if (discordRisk) discordRisk.value = String(state.discordReport.includeRisk);
030672:         const discordForecast = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-forecast"]');
030673:         if (discordForecast) discordForecast.value = String(state.discordReport.includeForecast);
030674:         const financeVaultEnabled = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="finance-vault-enabled"]');
030675:         if (financeVaultEnabled) financeVaultEnabled.value = String(state.financialVault.enabled);
030676:         const financeVaultRetention = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="finance-vault-retention"]');
030677:         if (financeVaultRetention) financeVaultRetention.value = String(state.financialVault.retentionDays);
030678:         const financeRuleFeed = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="finance-rule-feed"]');
030679:         if (financeRuleFeed) financeRuleFeed.value = String(state.financialVault.ruleFeedEnabled);
030680:         setDiscordStatus(discordFinanceStatus, discordFinanceStatusTone);
030681:         if (panel.classList.contains('mcms-open') && state.activeTab === 'discord') renderFinanceVaultStatus();
030682:         const nightStart = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="auto-night-start"]');
030683:         if (nightStart) nightStart.value = state.autoNight.nightStart;
030684:         const dayStart = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="auto-day-start"]');
030685:         if (dayStart) dayStart.value = state.autoNight.dayStart;
030686:         const nightTheme = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="auto-night-theme"]');
030687:         if (nightTheme) nightTheme.value = state.autoNight.nightTheme;
030688:         const dayTheme = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="auto-day-theme"]');
030689:         if (dayTheme) dayTheme.value = state.autoNight.dayTheme;
030690:         const economyStatus = panel.querySelector('.mcms-economy-status');
030691:         if (economyStatus) economyStatus.textContent = state.economyMode
030692:             ? 'Economy Mode is ON: static visual effects, adaptive refresh intervals and off-screen vehicle/building layer culling are active.'
030693:             : 'Economy Mode is OFF. Use the leaf button beside the map-menu opener to reduce CPU, GPU and marker workload.';
030694:         const nudge = panel.querySelector('.mcms-nudge-value');
030695:         if (nudge) nudge.textContent = `X ${state.nudge.x} / Y ${state.nudge.y}`;
030696:         if (panel.classList.contains('mcms-open') && state.activeTab === 'settings') renderProfiles();
030697:         if ((panel.classList.contains('mcms-open') && state.activeTab === 'ops') || operationalUiIsVisible()) renderOperationalPanels();
030698:     }
030699: 
030700:     function ensureUi() {
030701:         const mapEl = getLargestLeafletMap();
030702:         if (settingsPanelActivated && !document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId)) createPanel();
030703:         if (mapEl) {
030704:             createControl(mapEl);
030705:             const map = findLeafletMapInstance(false);
030706:             if (state.economyMode && map) { applyLeafletEconomyPolicy(map); scheduleEconomyLayerSync(0); }
030707:             if (state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled && operationalStartupComplete) scheduleMajorIncidentFeedRender(0);
030708:             else if (!state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled) removeMajorIncidentFeed();
030709:             const payoutOverlay = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.payoutFlashId);
030710:             if (payoutOverlay?.classList.contains('mcms-payout-active')) positionPayoutFlashOverlay(payoutOverlay, mapEl);
030711:         }
030712:         return Boolean(mapEl && document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId));
030713:     }
030714: 
030715:     function mutationBelongsToToolkit(mutation) {
030716:         const target = mutation.target;
030717:         const toolkitTarget = Boolean(
030718:             target &&
030719:             target.nodeType === 1 &&
030720:             (
030721:                 target.id === SCRIPT.controlId ||
030722:                 target.id === SCRIPT.panelId ||
030723:                 target.id === SCRIPT.toastId ||
030724:                 target.id === SCRIPT.payoutFlashId ||
030725:                 target.id === SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId ||
030726:                 target.id === SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId ||
030727:                 target.id === SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId ||
030728:                 target.id === SCRIPT.missionInspectorId ||
030729:                 target.id === SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId ||
030730:                 target.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.controlId}`) ||
030731:                 target.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.panelId}`) ||
030732:                 target.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.toastId}`) ||
030733:                 target.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}`) ||
030734:                 target.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}`) ||
030735:                 target.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId}`) ||
030736:                 target.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId}`) ||
030737:                 target.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId}`) ||
030738:                 target.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId}`)
030739:             )
030740:         );
030741:         if (toolkitTarget) return true;
030742:         if (mutation.type === 'attributes' && mutation.attributeName === 'class' && target?.classList) {
030743:             for (const className of target.classList) {
030744:                 if (String(className).startsWith('mcms-')) return true;
030745:             }
030746:         }
030747:         const toolkitSelector = '.mcms-alliance-credit-icon, .mcms-alliance-credit-badge, .mcms-mission-age-icon, .mcms-mission-age-badge, .mcms-unit-commitment-icon, .mcms-unit-commitment-badge, .mcms-transport-watcher-icon, .mcms-transport-watcher-badge, .mcms-resource-gap-icon, .mcms-resource-gap-badge, .mcms-stuck-mission-icon, .mcms-stuck-mission-badge, .mcms-mission-spawn-label-icon, .mcms-mission-spawn-label';
030748:         let elementCount = 0;
030749:         for (const collection of [mutation.addedNodes, mutation.removedNodes]) {
030750:             if (!collection?.length) continue;
030751:             for (const node of collection) {
030752:                 if (!node || node.nodeType !== 1) continue;
030753:                 elementCount += 1;
030754:                 if (!(node.matches?.(toolkitSelector) || node.querySelector?.(toolkitSelector))) return false;
030755:             }
030756:         }
030757:         return elementCount > 0;
030758:     }
030759: 
030760:     function mutationAddsLeafletMarkerIcon(mutation) {
030761:         if (!mutation || mutation.type !== 'childList' || !mutation.addedNodes?.length) return false;
030762:         for (const node of mutation.addedNodes) {
030763:             if (!node || node.nodeType !== 1) continue;
030764:             if (node.matches?.('.mcms-alliance-credit-icon, .mcms-mission-age-icon, .mcms-unit-commitment-icon, .mcms-transport-watcher-icon, .mcms-resource-gap-icon, .mcms-stuck-mission-icon, .mcms-mission-spawn-label-icon') || node.querySelector?.('.mcms-alliance-credit-icon, .mcms-mission-age-icon, .mcms-unit-commitment-icon, .mcms-transport-watcher-icon, .mcms-resource-gap-icon, .mcms-stuck-mission-icon, .mcms-mission-spawn-label-icon')) continue;
030765:             if (node.matches?.('.leaflet-marker-icon')) return true;
030766:             if (node.querySelector?.('.leaflet-marker-icon')) return true;
030767:         }
030768:         return false;
030769:     }
030770: 
030771:     function mutationTouchesSelector(mutation, selector) {
030772:         const target = mutation?.target;
030773:         if (target?.nodeType === 1 && (target.matches?.(selector) || target.closest?.(selector))) return true;
030774:         for (const collection of [mutation?.addedNodes, mutation?.removedNodes]) {
030775:             if (!collection?.length) continue;
030776:             for (const node of collection) {
030777:                 if (!node || node.nodeType !== 1) continue;
030778:                 if (node.matches?.(selector) || node.querySelector?.(selector)) return true;
030779:             }
030780:         }
030781:         return false;
030782:     }
030783: 
030784:     function mutationRemovesToolkitUi(mutation) {
030785:         for (const node of mutation?.removedNodes || []) {
030786:             if (!node || node.nodeType !== 1) continue;
030787:             if ([SCRIPT.panelId, SCRIPT.controlId, SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId].includes(node.id)) return true;
030788:             if (node.querySelector?.(`#${SCRIPT.panelId}, #${SCRIPT.controlId}, #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId}`)) return true;
030789:         }
030790:         return false;
030791:     }
030792: 
030793:     function mutationAffectsMissionData(mutation) {
030794:         return mutationTouchesSelector(mutation, '.leaflet-marker-pane, .leaflet-marker-icon, [id^="mission_"], #missions, #mission_list, .missionSideBarEntry, .mission-side-bar-entry, [data-mission-id]');
030795:     }
030796: 
030797:     function mutationAffectsMapLayout(mutation) {
030798:         const target = mutation?.target;
030799:         if (target?.nodeType === 1) {
030800:             if (target.matches?.('#map, #map_outer, .leaflet-container')) return true;
030801:             if (target.closest?.('.navbar, .modal, .modal-backdrop, .dropdown-menu, .popover, [role="dialog"]')) return true;
030802:         }
030803:         for (const collection of [mutation?.addedNodes, mutation?.removedNodes]) {
030804:             if (!collection?.length) continue;
030805:             for (const node of collection) {
030806:                 if (!node || node.nodeType !== 1) continue;
030807:                 if (node.matches?.('#map, #map_outer, .leaflet-container, .navbar, .modal, .modal-backdrop, .dropdown-menu, .popover, [role="dialog"]')) return true;
030808:                 if (node.querySelector?.('#map, #map_outer, .leaflet-container, .navbar, .modal, .modal-backdrop, .dropdown-menu, .popover, [role="dialog"]')) return true;
030809:             }
030810:         }
030811:         return false;
030812:     }
030813: 
030814: 
030815:     const ALLIANCE_BUILDINGS_MAP_NOTICE_ID = 'mcms-alliance-buildings-map-notice';
030816: 
030817:     function findAllianceBuildingsMapElement() {
030818:         if (!isAllianceBuildingsContext()) return null;
030819:         const candidates = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#verband-gebauede-map, #verband-gebaeude-map, #map, #map_outer .leaflet-container, [id*="gebauede"][id*="map"], [id*="gebaeude"][id*="map"], .leaflet-container'));
030820:         return candidates.find(element => {
030821:             if (!element || element.closest(`#${SCRIPT.controlId}, #${SCRIPT.panelId}, #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}, #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId}`)) return false;
030822:             const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect?.();
030823:             return !rect || rect.width >= 120 || rect.height >= 120 || element.id === 'map' || element.id === 'verband-gebauede-map' || element.id === 'verband-gebaeude-map';
030824:         }) || null;
030825:     }
030826: 
030827:     function findResponsiveColumn(element) {
030828:         let current = element;
030829:         for (let depth = 0; current && current !== document.body && depth < 7; depth += 1, current = current.parentElement) {
030830:             const className = typeof current.className === 'string' ? current.className : '';
030831:             if (/\bcol-(?:xs|sm|md|lg|xl|xxl)-\d+\b/u.test(className)) return current;
030832:         }
030833:         return element?.parentElement || null;
030834:     }
030835: 
030836:     function findAllianceBuildingsListColumn(mapColumn) {
030837:         const row = mapColumn?.parentElement;
030838:         if (!row) return null;
030839:         const siblings = Array.from(row.children).filter(child => child !== mapColumn);
030840:         return siblings.find(child => child.querySelector?.('table')) || siblings.find(child => /\bcol-(?:xs|sm|md|lg|xl|xxl)-\d+\b/u.test(String(child.className || ''))) || mapColumn.nextElementSibling;
030841:     }
030842: 
030843:     function allianceBuildingsMapNoticeHtml(enabled) {
030844:         const blocked = !enabled;
030845:         return `
030846:             <span class="mcms-alliance-map-copy">
030847:                 <strong>${blocked ? 'Alliance Map Blocker ON' : 'Alliance Map Blocker OFF'}</strong>
030848:                 <small>${blocked ? 'The Alliance Buildings / Courses list remains available at full width. Its map tiles and alliance marker attachment are blocked.' : 'Turn the blocker on to stop the heavy map in the Alliance Buildings / Courses menu.'}</small>
030849:             </span>
030850:             <button type="button" data-mcms-alliance-map-toggle="${blocked ? 'restore' : 'block'}">${blocked ? 'Disable blocker & reload' : 'Enable blocker & reload'}</button>
030851:         `;
030852:     }
030853: 
030854:     function renderAllianceBuildingsMapPreference() {
030855:         if (!isAllianceBuildingsContext()) return false;
030856:         const root = document.documentElement;
030857:         const enabled = state.allianceBuildingsMap !== false;
030858:         root.setAttribute('data-mcms-alliance-buildings-page', 'true');
030859:         root.setAttribute('data-mcms-alliance-buildings-map', enabled ? 'enabled' : 'disabled');
030860:         const mapElement = findAllianceBuildingsMapElement();
030861:         if (!mapElement) return false;
030862:         const mapColumn = findResponsiveColumn(mapElement);
030863:         const listColumn = findAllianceBuildingsListColumn(mapColumn);
030864:         if (!mapColumn) return false;
030865:         mapColumn.classList.toggle('mcms-alliance-buildings-map-column', !enabled);
030866:         mapColumn.toggleAttribute('data-mcms-alliance-map-column', !enabled);
030867:         mapColumn.setAttribute('aria-hidden', String(!enabled));
030868:         if (listColumn) {
030869:             listColumn.classList.toggle('mcms-alliance-buildings-list-column', !enabled);
030870:             listColumn.toggleAttribute('data-mcms-alliance-list-column', !enabled);
030871:         }
030872:         let notice = document.getElementById(ALLIANCE_BUILDINGS_MAP_NOTICE_ID);
030873:         const target = enabled ? mapColumn : (listColumn || mapColumn.parentElement || document.body);
030874:         if (!notice) {
030875:             notice = document.createElement('div');
030876:             notice.id = ALLIANCE_BUILDINGS_MAP_NOTICE_ID;
030877:         }
030878:         notice.classList.toggle('mcms-alliance-map-enabled', enabled);
030879:         notice.innerHTML = allianceBuildingsMapNoticeHtml(enabled);
030880:         if (notice.parentElement !== target) target.insertBefore(notice, target.firstChild || null);
030881:         return true;
030882:     }
030883: 
030884:     function pruneRuntimeCaches(now = Date.now()) {
030885:         for (const [missionId, panel] of missionPanelCache.entries()) {
030886:             if (!panel?.isConnected) missionPanelCache.delete(missionId);
030887:         }
030888:         for (const [missionId, cached] of missionSnapshotCache.entries()) {
030889:             if (liveMissionSnapshots.has(missionId)) continue;
030890:             if (now - Number(cached?.lastUsed || now) > MISSION_CACHE_RETENTION_MS) missionSnapshotCache.delete(missionId);
030891:         }
030892:         for (const missionId of missionOverlayVersions.keys()) {
030893:             if (!missionOverlayData.has(missionId)) missionOverlayVersions.delete(missionId);
030894:         }
030895:         for (const [name, cached] of markerRegistryCache.entries()) {
030896:             if (now - Number(cached?.createdAt || now) > RUNTIME_CACHE_PRUNE_MS) markerRegistryCache.delete(name);
030897:         }
030898:         for (const [missionId, cached] of criticalMissionStableCache.entries()) {
030899:             if (liveMissionSnapshots.has(missionId)) continue;
030900:             if (now - Number(cached?.lastSeen || now) > MISSION_CACHE_RETENTION_MS) criticalMissionStableCache.delete(missionId);
030901:         }
030902:         for (const [key, cached] of resourceGapAnalysisCache.entries()) {
030903:             if (now - Number(cached?.createdAt || now) > Math.max(2 * RESOURCE_GAP_REFRESH_MS, RUNTIME_CACHE_PRUNE_MS)) resourceGapAnalysisCache.delete(key);
030904:         }
030905:         if (resourceGapAnalysisCache.size > 180) {
030906:             const ordered = Array.from(resourceGapAnalysisCache.entries()).sort((a, b) => Number(a[1]?.createdAt || 0) - Number(b[1]?.createdAt || 0));
030907:             for (const [key] of ordered.slice(0, resourceGapAnalysisCache.size - 180)) resourceGapAnalysisCache.delete(key);
030908:         }
030909:         const currentVehicleLayers = new Set(getVehicleMarkerLayers());
030910:         const currentBuildingLayers = new Set(getBuildingMarkerLayers());
030911:         for (const layer of Array.from(economyHiddenVehicleLayers)) {
030912:             if (!layer || (!layer._map && !currentVehicleLayers.has(layer))) economyHiddenVehicleLayers.delete(layer);
030913:         }
030914:         for (const layer of Array.from(economyHiddenBuildingLayers)) {
030915:             if (!layer || (!layer._map && !currentBuildingLayers.has(layer))) economyHiddenBuildingLayers.delete(layer);
030916:         }
030917:         if (!state.resourceGap.enabled) {
030918:             resourceGapAnalysisCache.clear();
030919:             resourceGapVehicleContextCache = { key: '', createdAt: 0, available: [], byToken: new Map() };
030920:         }
030921:         if (!state.heatmap.enabled && heatmapSourceCache.points.length) heatmapSourceCache = { key: '', createdAt: 0, points: [] };
030922:     }
030923: 
030924:     function installAllianceBuildingsPageOptimisation() {
030925:         const initiallyInContext = isAllianceBuildingsContext();
030926:         const enabled = state.allianceBuildingsMap !== false;
030927:         let renderTimer = null;
030928:         const renderWhenRelevant = () => {
030929:             if (!isAllianceBuildingsContext()) {
030930:                 document.getElementById(ALLIANCE_BUILDINGS_MAP_NOTICE_ID)?.remove();
030931:                 document.querySelectorAll('.mcms-alliance-buildings-map-column').forEach(element => element.classList.remove('mcms-alliance-buildings-map-column'));
030932:                 document.querySelectorAll('.mcms-alliance-buildings-list-column').forEach(element => element.classList.remove('mcms-alliance-buildings-list-column'));
030933:                 clearAllianceBuildingsEarlyContext();
030934:                 return false;
030935:             }
030936:             if (!enabled) optimiseAllianceBuildingsCourseTableEarly();
030937:             return renderAllianceBuildingsMapPreference();
030938:         };
030939:         if (initiallyInContext || !enabled) {
030940:             renderWhenRelevant();
030941:             runtimeSetTimeout(renderWhenRelevant, 40);
030942:             runtimeSetTimeout(renderWhenRelevant, 300);
030943:             runtimeSetTimeout(renderWhenRelevant, 1200);
030944:             const pageObserver = runtimeTrackObserver(new MutationObserver(mutations => {
030945:                 if (!mutations.some(mutation => mutation.addedNodes?.length || mutation.removedNodes?.length)) return;
030946:                 runtimeClearTimeout(renderTimer);
030947:                 renderTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
030948:                     renderTimer = null;
030949:                     renderWhenRelevant();
030950:                 }, 0);
030951:             }));
030952:             pageObserver.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
030953:         }
030954:         runtimeListen(document, 'click', event => {
030955:             const button = closestEventTarget(event, '[data-mcms-alliance-map-toggle]');
030956:             if (!button) return;
030957:             event.preventDefault();
030958:             event.stopPropagation();
030959:             state.allianceBuildingsMap = button.dataset.mcmsAllianceMapToggle === 'restore';
030960:             saveState();
030961:             button.disabled = true;
030962:             button.textContent = 'Reloading…';
030963:             runtimeSetTimeout(() => location.reload(), 120);
030964:         }, true);
030965:         runtimeOnCleanup(() => {
030966:             document.getElementById(ALLIANCE_BUILDINGS_MAP_NOTICE_ID)?.remove();
030967:             document.querySelectorAll('.mcms-alliance-buildings-map-column').forEach(element => element.classList.remove('mcms-alliance-buildings-map-column'));
030968:             document.querySelectorAll('.mcms-alliance-buildings-list-column').forEach(element => element.classList.remove('mcms-alliance-buildings-list-column'));
030969:             document.querySelectorAll('[data-mcms-alliance-map-column], [data-mcms-alliance-list-column]').forEach(element => {
030970:                 element.removeAttribute('data-mcms-alliance-map-column');
030971:                 element.removeAttribute('data-mcms-alliance-list-column');
030972:             });
030973:             document.documentElement?.removeAttribute('data-mcms-alliance-buildings-page');
030974:         });
030975:         return initiallyInContext && !enabled;
030976:     }
030977: 
030978: 
030979:     function connectMainMutationObserver() {
030980:         if (!mainMutationObserver || runtime.destroyed || !document.body) return;
030981:         try { mainMutationObserver.disconnect(); } catch (err) {}
030982:         const roots = new Set();
030983:         const mapElement = getLargestLeafletMap();
030984:         const mapRoot = mapElement?.closest?.('#map_outer') || mapElement?.parentElement || mapElement;
030985:         const missionRoot = document.querySelector('#missions, #mission_list, .missions-panel, .mission-list');
030986:         if (mapRoot?.isConnected) roots.add(mapRoot);
030987:         if (missionRoot?.isConnected) roots.add(missionRoot);
030988:         if (!roots.size) {
030989:             mainMutationObserverFallbackActive = true;
030990:             mainMutationObserver.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
030991:             return;
030992:         }
030993:         mainMutationObserverFallbackActive = false;
030994:         for (const root of roots) mainMutationObserver.observe(root, { childList: true, subtree: true });
030995:         mainMutationObserver.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: false });
030996:     }
030997: 
030998:     async function runDeferredOperationalStartup() {
030999:         if (operationalStartupStarted || runtime.destroyed) return;
031000:         const operationalPerformanceStartedAt = startupClock();
031001:         if (document.hidden) {
031002:             runtimeSetTimeout(() => scheduleDeferredOperationalStartup(0), 1000);
031003:             return;
031004:         }
031005:         operationalStartupStarted = true;
031006:         loadCachedFinancialRules();
031007:         loadCachedFinancialPolicy();
031008:         ensureFinanceVaultCredential(financePlayerIdentity());
031009:         scanInlineMissionMarkerData();
031010:         installMissionMarkerAddHook();
031011:         installRadioMessageHook();
031012:         if (state.missionValue) installMissionValueWindows();
031013:         startupDataPassActive = true;
031014:         try {
031015:             if (vehicleDataNeeded()) await refreshPersonalVehicleData(true);
031016:         } finally {
031017:             startupDataPassActive = false;
031018:         }
031019:         runtimeClearTimeout(missionSnapshotTimer);
031020:         missionSnapshotTimer = null;
031021:         if (missionSnapshotsNeeded()) refreshMissionSnapshots();
031022:         if (state.missionSpawn.enabled) primeMissionSpawnDetector();
031023:         if (state.stuckDetector.enabled) scheduleStuckMissionRefresh(180);
031024:         if (state.transportWatcher) scheduleTransportWatcherRefresh(220);
031025:         if (state.resourceGap.enabled) scheduleResourceGapRefresh(260);
031026:         if (state.unitCommitment) scheduleUnitCommitmentRefresh(300);
031027:         if (state.allianceCredits) scheduleAllianceCreditRefresh(320);
031028:         if (state.missionAge) scheduleMissionAgeRefresh(340);
031029:         operationalStartupComplete = true;
031030:         scheduleOperationalPanelsRender(0);
031031:         if (state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled) scheduleMajorIncidentFeedRender(120);
031032:         scheduleEnabledMapRefreshes({ includeSnapshots: false, positionPanel: false, mapOnly: true });
031033:         recordStartupMetric('operationalStartupMs', operationalPerformanceStartedAt, { operationalStartupComplete: true });
031034: 
031035:     }
031036: 
031037:     function scheduleDeferredOperationalStartup(delay = STARTUP_OPERATIONAL_DELAY_MS) {
031038:         if (operationalStartupStarted || runtime.destroyed) return;
031039:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => runtimeRunWhenIdle(() => {
031040:             runDeferredOperationalStartup().catch(err => {
031041:                 operationalStartupComplete = true;
031042:                 startupDataPassActive = false;
031043:                 console.debug(`[${SCRIPT.name}] Deferred startup recovered after an operational initialisation error.`, err);
031044:                 connectMainMutationObserver();
031045:             });
031046:         }, STARTUP_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS), Math.max(0, Number(delay) || 0));
031047:     }
031048: 
031049: 
031050:     const AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_SELECTOR = 'a.missing_vehicles_load[href*="/missing_vehicles"]';
031051:     const AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_MISSION_ROOT_SELECTOR = '#lightbox_box, #lightbox, .lightbox_content, .modal.show, .modal.in, .modal-content, [role="dialog"], .ui-dialog-content, .ui-dialog';
031052:     const AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_MAX_REQUESTS = 50;
031053:     const AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_SETTLE_MS = 180;
031054:     const AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_TIMEOUT_MS = 6000;
031055:     const AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_HIDDEN_RETRIES = 24;
031056:     let autoLoadAllVehiclesObserver = null;
031057:     let autoLoadAllVehiclesLinkObserver = null;
031058:     let autoLoadAllVehiclesRootObserver = null;
031059:     let autoLoadAllVehiclesScanTimer = null;
031060:     let autoLoadAllVehiclesReleaseTimer = null;
031061:     let autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionId = null;
031062:     let autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot = null;
031063:     let autoLoadAllVehiclesActiveLink = null;
031064:     let autoLoadAllVehiclesActiveSignature = '';
031065:     let autoLoadAllVehiclesInFlight = false;
031066:     let autoLoadAllVehiclesRequestCount = 0;
031067:     let autoLoadAllVehiclesHiddenRetryCount = 0;
031068:     const autoLoadAllVehiclesRequestedPages = new Set();
031069: 
031070:     function autoLoadAllVehiclesLinkInfo(link) {
031071:         if (!link || link.nodeType !== 1 || !link.matches?.(AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_SELECTOR)) return null;
031072:         let url;
031073:         try { url = new URL(link.getAttribute('href') || link.href, location.href); } catch (err) { return null; }
031074:         if (url.origin !== location.origin) return null;
031075:         const match = url.pathname.match(/^\/missions\/(\d+)\/missing_vehicles\/?$/u);
031076:         if (!match) return null;
031077:         const rawOffset = url.searchParams.get('offset_page');
031078:         const offsetPage = Number.isFinite(Number(rawOffset)) ? Math.max(0, Number(rawOffset)) : 0;
031079:         return {
031080:             missionId: match[1],
031081:             offsetPage,
031082:             signature: `${match[1]}:${offsetPage}:${url.pathname}${url.search}`,
031083:             href: url.href
031084:         };
031085:     }
031086: 
031087:     function autoLoadAllVehiclesElementVisible(element) {
031088:         if (!element?.isConnected || element.hidden || element.getAttribute?.('aria-hidden') === 'true') return false;
031089:         if (element.matches?.(':disabled, .disabled, [aria-disabled="true"]')) return false;
031090:         try {
031091:             const style = pageWindow.getComputedStyle?.(element);
031092:             if (style?.display === 'none' || style?.visibility === 'hidden' || style?.visibility === 'collapse' || style?.pointerEvents === 'none' || Number(style?.opacity) === 0) return false;
031093:             const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect?.();
031094:             return !rect || (rect.width > 1 && rect.height > 1);
031095:         } catch (err) {
031096:             return true;
031097:         }
031098:     }
031099: 
031100:     function autoLoadAllVehiclesResolveMissionRoot(link) {
031101:         return link.closest?.(AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_MISSION_ROOT_SELECTOR) || link.parentElement || document.body;
031102:     }
031103: 
031104:     function autoLoadAllVehiclesCandidateLinks() {
031105:         if (!state.autoLoadAllVehicles) return [];
031106:         const queryRoot = autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot?.isConnected && autoLoadAllVehiclesElementVisible(autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot)
031107:             ? autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot
031108:             : document;
031109:         return Array.from(queryRoot.querySelectorAll(AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_SELECTOR))
031110:             .reverse()
031111:             .map(link => ({ link, info: autoLoadAllVehiclesLinkInfo(link) }))
031112:             .filter(candidate => Boolean(candidate.info));
031113:     }
031114: 
031115:     function clearAutoLoadAllVehiclesReleaseTimer() {
031116:         runtimeClearTimeout(autoLoadAllVehiclesReleaseTimer);
031117:         autoLoadAllVehiclesReleaseTimer = null;
031118:     }
031119: 
031120:     function disconnectAutoLoadAllVehiclesLinkObserver() {
031121:         runtimeUntrackObserver(autoLoadAllVehiclesLinkObserver);
031122:         autoLoadAllVehiclesLinkObserver = null;
031123:     }
031124: 
031125:     function disconnectAutoLoadAllVehiclesRootObserver() {
031126:         runtimeUntrackObserver(autoLoadAllVehiclesRootObserver);
031127:         autoLoadAllVehiclesRootObserver = null;
031128:     }
031129: 
031130:     function releaseAutoLoadAllVehiclesRequest({ schedule = true } = {}) {
031131:         clearAutoLoadAllVehiclesReleaseTimer();
031132:         disconnectAutoLoadAllVehiclesLinkObserver();
031133:         autoLoadAllVehiclesInFlight = false;
031134:         autoLoadAllVehiclesActiveLink = null;
031135:         autoLoadAllVehiclesActiveSignature = '';
031136:         if (schedule && state.autoLoadAllVehicles) scheduleAutoLoadAllVehiclesScan(AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_SETTLE_MS);
031137:     }
031138: 
031139:     function resetAutoLoadAllVehiclesMission() {
031140:         releaseAutoLoadAllVehiclesRequest({ schedule: false });
031141:         disconnectAutoLoadAllVehiclesRootObserver();
031142:         autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionId = null;
031143:         autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot = null;
031144:         autoLoadAllVehiclesRequestCount = 0;
031145:         autoLoadAllVehiclesHiddenRetryCount = 0;
031146:         autoLoadAllVehiclesRequestedPages.clear();
031147:     }
031148: 
031149:     function observeAutoLoadAllVehiclesRoot(root) {
031150:         disconnectAutoLoadAllVehiclesRootObserver();
031151:         if (!root || root === document.body) return;
031152:         const observer = runtimeTrackObserver(new MutationObserver(() => {
031153:             if (!state.autoLoadAllVehicles) return;
031154:             if (!root.isConnected || !autoLoadAllVehiclesElementVisible(root)) {
031155:                 resetAutoLoadAllVehiclesMission();
031156:                 return;
031157:             }
031158:             scheduleAutoLoadAllVehiclesScan(AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_SETTLE_MS);
031159:         }));
031160:         observer.observe(root, {
031161:             attributes: true,
031162:             attributeFilter: ['class', 'style', 'hidden', 'aria-hidden']
031163:         });
031164:         autoLoadAllVehiclesRootObserver = observer;
031165:     }
031166: 
031167:     function observeAutoLoadAllVehiclesLink(link) {
031168:         disconnectAutoLoadAllVehiclesLinkObserver();
031169:         if (!link) return;
031170:         const observer = runtimeTrackObserver(new MutationObserver(() => {
031171:             if (!state.autoLoadAllVehicles) return;
031172:             const info = autoLoadAllVehiclesLinkInfo(link);
031173:             const changed = Boolean(info && info.signature !== autoLoadAllVehiclesActiveSignature);
031174:             if (!link.isConnected || !info || !autoLoadAllVehiclesElementVisible(link) || changed) {
031175:                 releaseAutoLoadAllVehiclesRequest({ schedule: true });
031176:             }
031177:         }));
031178:         observer.observe(link, {
031179:             attributes: true,
031180:             attributeFilter: ['href', 'class', 'style', 'hidden', 'aria-hidden', 'aria-disabled']
031181:         });
031182:         autoLoadAllVehiclesLinkObserver = observer;
031183:     }
031184: 
031185:     function scheduleAutoLoadAllVehiclesScan(delay = 0) {
031186:         if (!state.autoLoadAllVehicles || runtime.destroyed) return;
031187:         runtimeClearTimeout(autoLoadAllVehiclesScanTimer);
031188:         autoLoadAllVehiclesScanTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
031189:             autoLoadAllVehiclesScanTimer = null;
031190:             scanAutoLoadAllVehicles();
031191:         }, Math.max(0, Number(delay) || 0));
031192:     }
031193: 
031194:     function scanAutoLoadAllVehicles() {
031195:         if (!state.autoLoadAllVehicles || runtime.destroyed || autoLoadAllVehiclesInFlight) return false;
031196:         const candidates = autoLoadAllVehiclesCandidateLinks();
031197:         if (!candidates.length) {
031198:             autoLoadAllVehiclesHiddenRetryCount = 0;
031199:             if (autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot && (!autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot.isConnected || !autoLoadAllVehiclesElementVisible(autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot))) {
031200:                 resetAutoLoadAllVehiclesMission();
031201:             }
031202:             return false;
031203:         }
031204:         const visibleCandidates = candidates.filter(candidate => autoLoadAllVehiclesElementVisible(candidate.link));
031205:         if (!visibleCandidates.length) {
031206:             if (autoLoadAllVehiclesHiddenRetryCount < AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_HIDDEN_RETRIES) {
031207:                 autoLoadAllVehiclesHiddenRetryCount += 1;
031208:                 scheduleAutoLoadAllVehiclesScan(AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_SETTLE_MS);
031209:             }
031210:             return false;
031211:         }
031212:         autoLoadAllVehiclesHiddenRetryCount = 0;
031213:         const candidate = visibleCandidates.find(item => item.info.missionId !== autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionId || !autoLoadAllVehiclesRequestedPages.has(item.info.signature)) || visibleCandidates[0];
031214:         const { link, info } = candidate;
