031215:         const missionRoot = autoLoadAllVehiclesResolveMissionRoot(link);
031216:         if (info.missionId !== autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionId || missionRoot !== autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot) {
031217:             resetAutoLoadAllVehiclesMission();
031218:             autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionId = info.missionId;
031219:             autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot = missionRoot;
031220:             observeAutoLoadAllVehiclesRoot(missionRoot);
031221:         }
031222:         if (autoLoadAllVehiclesRequestedPages.has(info.signature)) return false;
031223:         if (autoLoadAllVehiclesRequestCount >= AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_MAX_REQUESTS) {
031224:             console.warn(`[${SCRIPT.name}] Auto-load all vehicles stopped after ${AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_MAX_REQUESTS} requests for mission ${info.missionId}.`);
031225:             return false;
031226:         }
031227:         autoLoadAllVehiclesRequestedPages.add(info.signature);
031228:         autoLoadAllVehiclesRequestCount += 1;
031229:         autoLoadAllVehiclesInFlight = true;
031230:         autoLoadAllVehiclesActiveLink = link;
031231:         autoLoadAllVehiclesActiveSignature = info.signature;
031232:         link.dataset.mcmsAutoLoadRequested = 'true';
031233:         observeAutoLoadAllVehiclesLink(link);
031234:         try {
031235:             link.click();
031236:         } catch (err) {
031237:             autoLoadAllVehiclesRequestedPages.delete(info.signature);
031238:             releaseAutoLoadAllVehiclesRequest({ schedule: false });
031239:             console.warn(`[${SCRIPT.name}] Auto-load all vehicles could not activate MissionChief's native control.`, err);
031240:             return false;
031241:         }
031242:         clearAutoLoadAllVehiclesReleaseTimer();
031243:         autoLoadAllVehiclesReleaseTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
031244:             autoLoadAllVehiclesReleaseTimer = null;
031245:             releaseAutoLoadAllVehiclesRequest({ schedule: true });
031246:         }, AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_TIMEOUT_MS);
031247:         return true;
031248:     }
031249: 
031250:     function autoLoadAllVehiclesMutationRelevant(mutation) {
031251:         if (mutation.type !== 'childList') return false;
031252:         const nodes = [...Array.from(mutation.addedNodes || []), ...Array.from(mutation.removedNodes || [])];
031253:         return nodes.some(node => {
031254:             if (!node || node.nodeType !== 1) return false;
031255:             if (autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot && (node === autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot || node.contains?.(autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot))) return true;
031256:             return Boolean(
031257:                 node.matches?.(AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_SELECTOR) ||
031258:                 node.querySelector?.(AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_SELECTOR) ||
031259:                 node.matches?.(AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_MISSION_ROOT_SELECTOR) ||
031260:                 node.querySelector?.(AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_MISSION_ROOT_SELECTOR)
031261:             );
031262:         });
031263:     }
031264: 
031265:     function stopAutoLoadAllVehicles() {
031266:         runtimeClearTimeout(autoLoadAllVehiclesScanTimer);
031267:         autoLoadAllVehiclesScanTimer = null;
031268:         runtimeUntrackObserver(autoLoadAllVehiclesObserver);
031269:         autoLoadAllVehiclesObserver = null;
031270:         resetAutoLoadAllVehiclesMission();
031271:     }
031272: 
031273:     function installAutoLoadAllVehicles() {
031274:         if (!state.autoLoadAllVehicles || runtime.destroyed) {
031275:             stopAutoLoadAllVehicles();
031276:             return false;
031277:         }
031278:         if (!document.body) {
031279:             runtimeListen(document, 'DOMContentLoaded', installAutoLoadAllVehicles, { once: true });
031280:             return false;
031281:         }
031282:         if (!autoLoadAllVehiclesObserver) {
031283:             const observer = runtimeTrackObserver(new MutationObserver(mutations => {
031284:                 if (!state.autoLoadAllVehicles) return;
031285:                 if (autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot && !autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot.isConnected) {
031286:                     resetAutoLoadAllVehiclesMission();
031287:                 }
031288:                 if (autoLoadAllVehiclesActiveLink && !autoLoadAllVehiclesActiveLink.isConnected) {
031289:                     releaseAutoLoadAllVehiclesRequest({ schedule: false });
031290:                 }
031291:                 if (mutations.some(autoLoadAllVehiclesMutationRelevant)) scheduleAutoLoadAllVehiclesScan(AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_SETTLE_MS);
031292:             }));
031293:             observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
031294:             autoLoadAllVehiclesObserver = observer;
031295:         }
031296:         scheduleAutoLoadAllVehiclesScan(0);
031297:         return true;
031298:     }
031299: 
031300: 
031301:     function startBootAttemptCoordinator(bootPerformanceStartedAt) {
031302:         let attempts = 0;
031303:         const runBootAttempt = () => {
031304:             attempts += 1;
031305:             installMissionMarkerAddHook();
031306:             installRadioMessageHook();
031307:             installCreditsUpdateHook();
031308:             observeCreditValue();
031309:             const ready = ensureUi();
031310:             const mapReady = Boolean(getLargestLeafletMap());
031311:             if (ready && (mapReady || attempts >= 12)) {
031312:                 recordStartupMetric('coreUiReadyMs', bootPerformanceStartedAt, { bootAttempts: attempts });
031313:                 scheduleMarkerStateSync(0, false);
031314:                 scheduleDeferredOperationalStartup();
031315:                 runtimeSetTimeout(() => runtimeRunWhenIdle(connectMainMutationObserver, STARTUP_OBSERVER_DELAY_MS), STARTUP_OBSERVER_DELAY_MS);
031316:                 return;
031317:             }
031318:             if (attempts >= 90 || runtime.destroyed) return;
031319:             const delay = attempts < 12 ? 350 : attempts < 30 ? 700 : 1400;
031320:             runtimeSetTimeout(runBootAttempt, delay);
031321:         };
031322:         runtimeSetTimeout(runBootAttempt, 250);
031323:     }
031324: 
031325:     function boot() {
031326:         if (runtime.destroyed || bootStarted) return;
031327:         bootStarted = true;
031328:         bootStartedAt = Date.now();
031329:         const bootPerformanceStartedAt = startupClock();
031330:         applyRootAttributes();
031331:         if (installAllianceBuildingsPageOptimisation()) return;
031332:         createCleanExit();
031333:         if (state.autoLoadAllVehicles) installAutoLoadAllVehicles();
031334:         installMissionMarkerAddHook();
031335:         installRadioMessageHook();
031336:         lastObservedCredits = readCurrentCreditTotal();
031337:         installCreditsUpdateHook();
031338:         observeCreditValue();
031339:         installMissionRequirementsWindows();
031340:         startBootAttemptCoordinator(bootPerformanceStartedAt);
031341:         const observer = runtimeTrackObserver(new MutationObserver(mutations => {
031342:             if (state.economyMode && economyMapMoving) {
031343:                 economyDeferredDomMutation = true;
031344:                 return;
031345:             }
031346:             let externalMutationFound = false;
031347:             let addedLeafletMarker = false;
031348:             let missionChanged = false;
031349:             let layoutChanged = false;
031350:             let toolkitUiRemoved = false;
031351:             for (const mutation of mutations) {
031352:                 if (mutationBelongsToToolkit(mutation)) continue;
031353:                 externalMutationFound = true;
031354:                 if (!addedLeafletMarker && mutationAddsLeafletMarkerIcon(mutation)) {
031355:                     addedLeafletMarker = true;
031356:                     missionChanged = true;
031357:                 }
031358:                 if (!missionChanged && mutationAffectsMissionData(mutation)) missionChanged = true;
031359:                 if (!layoutChanged && mutationAffectsMapLayout(mutation)) layoutChanged = true;
031360:                 if (!toolkitUiRemoved && mutationRemovesToolkitUi(mutation)) toolkitUiRemoved = true;
031361:                 if (addedLeafletMarker && missionChanged && layoutChanged && toolkitUiRemoved) break;
031362:             }
031363:             if (!externalMutationFound) return;
031364:             missionChanged ||= addedLeafletMarker;
031365:             if (!missionChanged && !layoutChanged && !toolkitUiRemoved) return;
031366:             if (addedLeafletMarker) {
031367:                 invalidateMarkerRegistryCaches('all');
031368:                 scheduleMarkerStateSync(0, false);
031369:                 if (!state.visibility.buildings) scheduleMarkerStateSync(180, true);
031370:             }
031371:             if (layoutChanged) invalidateMapElementCache();
031372:             if (document.hidden || dragState || (state.economyMode && economyMapMoving)) return;
031373:             runtimeClearTimeout(mutationTimer);
031374:             const startupSettling = bootStartedAt > 0 && Date.now() - bootStartedAt < STARTUP_SETTLE_WINDOW_MS;
031375:             const mutationDelay = startupSettling
031376:                 ? STARTUP_MUTATION_DEBOUNCE_MS
031377:                 : (state.economyMode ? Math.max(320, DOM_REFRESH_DEBOUNCE_MS) : DOM_REFRESH_DEBOUNCE_MS);
031378:             mutationTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
031379:                 if (dragState || document.hidden || runtime.destroyed || (state.economyMode && economyMapMoving)) return;
031380:                 const panelMissing = settingsPanelActivated && !document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId);
031381:                 const mapElement = getLargestLeafletMap();
031382:                 const controlMissing = Boolean(mapElement && !document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId));
031383:                 if (toolkitUiRemoved || panelMissing || controlMissing) ensureUi();
031384:                 if (mainMutationObserverFallbackActive && (mapElement || document.querySelector('#missions, #mission_list, .missions-panel, .mission-list'))) {
031385:                     connectMainMutationObserver();
031386:                 }
031387:                 if (layoutChanged) {
031388:                     refreshSuppression();
031389:                     fitControlToMap();
031390:                     schedulePanelPosition(true, 50);
031391:                     scheduleCriticalDrawerDock(60);
031392:                 }
031393:                 if (missionChanged) {
031394:                     scheduleEnabledMapRefreshes({ includeSnapshots: missionSnapshotsNeeded(), positionPanel: false });
031395:                     scheduleMissionRequirementsScan(35);
031396:                 }
031397:             }, mutationDelay);
031398:         }));
031399:         mainMutationObserver = observer;
031400:         runtimeListen(document, 'keydown', handleKeyboard);
031401:         runtimeListen(document, 'pointerover', handleMissionInspectorPointerOver, true);
031402:         runtimeListen(document, 'pointermove', handleMissionInspectorPointerMove, true);
031403:         runtimeListen(document, 'pointerout', handleMissionInspectorPointerOut, true);
031404:         runtimeListen(document, 'pointerdown', () => unlockPayoutAudio(), { once: true, capture: true });
031405:         runtimeListen(document, 'click', event => {
031406:             runtimeSetTimeout(refreshSuppression, 0);
031407:             if (suppressNextOutsideClick) {
031408:                 event.preventDefault();
031409:                 event.stopPropagation();
031410:                 suppressNextOutsideClick = false;
031411:                 return;
031412:             }
031413:             const control = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId);
031414:             const panel = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId);
031415:             if (!panel || !panel.classList.contains('mcms-open')) return;
031416:             if (control && control.contains(event.target)) return;
031417:             if (panel.contains(event.target)) return;
031418:             closePanel();
031419:         }, true);
031420:         runtimeListen(pageWindow, 'resize', () => {
031421:             invalidateMapElementCache();
031422:             applyRootAttributes();
031423:             refreshTabletModeUi();
031424:             scheduleTabletLayoutRefresh(20);
031425:             const payoutOverlay = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.payoutFlashId);
031426:             if (payoutOverlay?.classList.contains('mcms-payout-active')) positionPayoutFlashOverlay(payoutOverlay);
031427:             if (dragState) return;
031428:             refreshSuppression();
031429:             fitControlToMap();
031430:             schedulePanelPosition(true, 40);
031431:             scheduleCriticalDrawerDock(30);
031432:             scheduleEnabledMapRefreshes({ includeSnapshots: false, positionPanel: false, mapOnly: true });
031433:             scheduleMajorIncidentFeedLayout();
031434:         });
031435:         runtimeListen(pageWindow, 'scroll', scheduleMajorIncidentFeedLayout, { passive: true });
031436:         runtimeListen(pageWindow, 'orientationchange', () => scheduleTabletLayoutRefresh(30));
031437:         if (pageWindow.visualViewport) {
031438:             runtimeListen(pageWindow.visualViewport, 'resize', () => scheduleTabletLayoutRefresh(20));
031439:             runtimeListen(pageWindow.visualViewport, 'scroll', () => {
031440:                 if (isTouchLayoutActive() && document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId)?.classList.contains('mcms-open')) scheduleTabletLayoutRefresh(20);
031441:             });
031442:         }
031443:         try {
031444:             const coarsePointerQuery = pageWindow.matchMedia?.('(any-pointer: coarse)');
031445:             if (coarsePointerQuery?.addEventListener) runtimeListen(coarsePointerQuery, 'change', () => scheduleTabletLayoutRefresh(20));
031446:         } catch (err) {}
031447:         runtimeListen(pageWindow, 'focus', () => {
031448:             if (dragState) return;
031449:             refreshSuppression();
031450:             fitControlToMap();
031451:             schedulePanelPosition(true, 40);
031452:             installRadioMessageHook();
031453:             if (vehicleDataNeeded()) refreshPersonalVehicleData(false);
031454:             if (state.economyMode) scheduleEconomyLayerSync(0);
031455:             scheduleEnabledMapRefreshes({ includeSnapshots: missionSnapshotsNeeded(), positionPanel: false });
031456:             scheduleOperationalPanelsRender(500);
031457:             scheduleMajorIncidentFeedRender(80);
031458:         });
031459:         const recoverUiAfterNavigation = event => {
031460:             runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
031461:                 if (runtime.destroyed || document.hidden) return;
031462:                 invalidateMapElementCache();
031463:                 ensureUi();
031464:                 connectMainMutationObserver();
031465:                 recoverMajorIncidentFeed(event?.type || 'navigation');
031466:             }, 120);
031467:             runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
031468:                 if (runtime.destroyed || document.hidden) return;
031469:                 recoverMajorIncidentFeed(`${event?.type || 'navigation'} settle`);
031470:             }, 650);
031471:         };
031472:         runtimeListen(pageWindow, 'pageshow', recoverUiAfterNavigation);
031473:         runtimeListen(pageWindow, 'popstate', recoverUiAfterNavigation);
031474:         runtimeListen(pageWindow, 'hashchange', recoverUiAfterNavigation);
031475:         runtimeRegisterTask('vehicle-data-refresh', VEHICLE_API_REFRESH_MS, () => {
031476:             if (!vehicleDataNeeded()) return;
031477:             installRadioMessageHook();
031478:             return refreshPersonalVehicleData(false);
031479:         }, {
031480:             economyIntervalMs: 10 * 60 * 1000,
031481:             economyIntervalResolver: () => operationalUiIsVisible() || document.getElementById(SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId)?.classList.contains('mcms-open') ? 2 * 60 * 1000 : 10 * 60 * 1000
031482:         });
031483:         runtimeRegisterTask('auto-night', 60 * 1000, () => runAutoNight(false), { intervalResolver: () => state.autoNight.enabled ? 60 * 1000 : 15 * 60 * 1000, economyIntervalMs: 5 * 60 * 1000, economyIntervalResolver: () => state.autoNight.enabled ? 5 * 60 * 1000 : 30 * 60 * 1000 });
031484:         runtimeRegisterTask('mission-maintenance', FALLBACK_MISSION_REFRESH_MS, () => {
031485:             if (state.economyMode && economyMapMoving) {
031486:                 economyDeferredMapRefresh = true;
031487:                 return;
031488:             }
031489:             installMissionMarkerAddHook();
031490:             installRadioMessageHook();
031491:             installCreditsUpdateHook();
031492:             observeCreditValue();
031493:             if (state.allianceCredits) scheduleAllianceCreditRefresh();
031494:             if (state.unitCommitment) scheduleUnitCommitmentRefresh();
031495:             if (state.resourceGap.enabled) scheduleResourceGapRefresh();
031496:             if (missionSnapshotsNeeded()) scheduleMissionSnapshotRefresh();
031497:             const criticalDrawer = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId);
031498:             if (criticalDrawer?.classList.contains('mcms-open')) {
031499:                 let hasClearingMission = false;
031500:                 for (const snapshot of liveMissionSnapshots.values()) {
031501:                     const progress = criticalMissionClearingProgress(snapshot);
031502:                     const units = snapshot?.units || personalUnitCommitmentForMission(snapshot?.missionId);
031503:                     if (progress && Math.max(0, Number(units?.onScene) || 0) > 0) {
031504:                         hasClearingMission = true;
031505:                         break;
031506:                     }
031507:                 }
031508:                 const refreshInterval = hasClearingMission ? CRITICAL_PROGRESS_REFRESH_ACTIVE_MS : CRITICAL_PROGRESS_REFRESH_IDLE_MS;
031509:                 return refreshMissionProgressFromPage(false, refreshInterval).then(refreshed => {
031510:                     if (!refreshed || document.hidden || !criticalDrawer.classList.contains('mcms-open')) return;
031511:                     refreshMissionSnapshots();
031512:                     criticalDrawerLastDataSyncAt = Math.max(criticalDrawerLastDataSyncAt, missionProgressPageLastSuccessAt);
031513:                     renderOperationalPanels(true, { updateViewTime: false, preserveScroll: true });
031514:                 });
031515:             }
031516:         }, {
031517:             economyIntervalMs: 60 * 1000,
031518:             economyIntervalResolver: () => document.getElementById(SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId)?.classList.contains('mcms-open') ? 30 * 1000 : 60 * 1000
031519:         });
031520:         runtimeRegisterTask('critical-countdowns', 1000, () => {
031521:             if (document.getElementById(SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId)?.classList.contains('mcms-open')) refreshCriticalClearingCountdowns();
031522:         }, {
031523:             intervalResolver: () => document.getElementById(SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId)?.classList.contains('mcms-open') ? 1000 : 60 * 1000,
031524:             economyIntervalMs: 10000,
031525:             economyIntervalResolver: () => document.getElementById(SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId)?.classList.contains('mcms-open') ? 10000 : 60 * 1000
031526:         });
031527:         runtimeRegisterTask('minute-maintenance', 60 * 1000, () => {
031528:             if (state.missionAge) scheduleMissionAgeRefresh();
031529:             if (state.stuckDetector.enabled) scheduleStuckMissionRefresh();
031530:             refreshVisibleMissionInspector();
031531:             scheduleOperationalPanelsRender(500);
031532:             pruneRuntimeCaches();
031533:         }, {
031534:             economyIntervalMs: 5 * 60 * 1000,
031535:             economyIntervalResolver: () => operationalUiIsVisible() ? 2 * 60 * 1000 : 5 * 60 * 1000
031536:         });
031537:         runtimeRegisterTask('major-incident-feed-integrity', 5000, () => {
031538:             if (!state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled) return;
031539:             recoverMajorIncidentFeed('integrity check');
031540:         }, {
031541:             intervalResolver: () => state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled ? 5000 : 60 * 1000,
031542:             economyIntervalMs: 12000,
031543:             economyIntervalResolver: () => state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled ? 12000 : 2 * 60 * 1000
031544:         });
031545:         runtimeRegisterTask('building-visibility', BUILDING_VISIBILITY_RECHECK_MS, () => {
031546:             if (!state.visibility.buildings) synchronisePersonalBuildingVisibility();
031547:             if (state.economyMode) scheduleEconomyLayerSync(0);
031548:         }, {
031549:             intervalResolver: () => !state.visibility.buildings ? BUILDING_VISIBILITY_RECHECK_MS : 60 * 1000,
031550:             economyIntervalMs: 45 * 1000,
031551:             economyIntervalResolver: () => (!state.visibility.buildings || state.economyMode) ? 45 * 1000 : 2 * 60 * 1000
031552:         });
031553:         runtimeListen(document, 'visibilitychange', () => {
031554:             if (document.hidden) return;
031555:             runtimeWakeTaskScheduler(0);
031556:             ensureUi();
031557:             refreshSuppression();
031558:             if (vehicleDataNeeded()) refreshPersonalVehicleData(false);
031559:             if (state.economyMode) scheduleEconomyLayerSync(0);
031560:             scheduleEnabledMapRefreshes({ includeSnapshots: missionSnapshotsNeeded(), positionPanel: true });
031561:             scheduleMajorIncidentFeedRender(80);
031562:         });
031563:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
031564:             if (document.hidden || !operationalStartupComplete) return;
031565:             scheduleEnabledMapRefreshes({ includeSnapshots: false, positionPanel: false, mapOnly: true });
031566:         }, 2200);
031567:         runtimeOnCleanup(() => {
031568:             stopAutoLoadAllVehicles();
031569:             transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested = true;
031570:             document.removeEventListener('mousemove', movePanelDrag, true);
031571:             document.removeEventListener('mouseup', endPanelDrag, true);
031572:             document.removeEventListener('touchmove', movePanelDrag, true);
031573:             document.removeEventListener('touchend', endPanelDrag, true);

031582:             const originalBuildingVisibility = state.visibility.buildings;
031583:             try {

031585:                 synchronisePersonalBuildingVisibility(cachedMap);
031586:             } catch (err) {
031587:                 console.debug(`[${SCRIPT.name}] Building visibility restoration skipped during teardown.`, err);
031588:             } finally {
031589:                 state.visibility.buildings = originalBuildingVisibility;
031590:             }

031628:         if (state.economyMode) runtimeSetTimeout(() => setEconomyMode(true, false), 420);
031629:         console.debug(`[${SCRIPT.name}] v${SCRIPT.version} audited runtime ready.`);
031630:     }
031631: 
031632:     function scheduleBoot() {
031633:         if (runtime.destroyed || bootStarted) return;
031634:         runtimeRunWhenIdle(boot, STARTUP_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS);
031635:     }
031636: 
031637:     if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
031638:         runtimeListen(document, 'DOMContentLoaded', scheduleBoot, { once: true });
031639:     } else {
031640:         scheduleBoot();
031641:     }
031642: })();
